clean_body: | = Let's have a money talk, Peter. I just got out of a finance meeting with Michele, and I need to be honest with you: Finances at this point are no joke. As a lot of you already know, we hopped into this race on the later end. We missed the first FEC fundraising quarter of the year, and we had less than two weeks to fundraise before the 2nd quarter ended. Now, with us in the second to last month of the final quarter of this year, like I said before: Finances at this point are no joke. From voter outreach to merch, from ads and volunteer recruitment, and so much more -- we need to position ourselves strongly and strategically in these last two months if we want to get Michele to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Chip Finance Director Michele for Florida = = *

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse deserves freedom.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58781983:6Kh1Qe2Nu:m:1:3253819041:F3B1D3024A25940EAA7DDF334FB83B64:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this, Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58781983:6Kh1Qe2Nu:m:1:3253819041:F3B1D3024A25940EAA7DDF334FB83B64:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58781983:6Kh1Qe2Nu:m:1:3253819041:F3B1D3024A25940EAA7DDF334FB83B64:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58781983:6Kh1Qe2Nu:m:1:3253819041:F3B1D3024A25940EAA7DDF334FB83B64:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---

name: V. Demings
subject: from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676064/316562332/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1706-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY4ZWY4ZS1lZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKWL07tAhFVGnE-x3iyxQ0TfhKRRkn57SZaFqRqaGh4=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676065/316562333/-144803992?refcode=jtk1706-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY4ZWY4ZS1lZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKWL07tAhFVGnE-x3iyxQ0TfhKRRkn57SZaFqRqaGh4=&emci=5ed1c33c-2d46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4a68ef8e-ee46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5ed1c33c-2d46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/4a68ef8e-ee46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY4ZWY4ZS1lZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKWL07tAhFVGnE-x3iyxQ0TfhKRRkn57SZaFqRqaGh4=&id=123159867). name: Eric Lynn
subject: DeSantis: quit playing games with our health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
Sign our petition about this wrong-headed Special Session [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676230/316563299/-1448293271?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU0ZjM0My1lZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lWFa7duPcbjs47sO9nkaPuKZJayyiUfyh3eo9dZQnrA=&emci=ea386453-4146-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9254f343-ef46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1139417) Dear friends, This week, the Florida legislature will be holding a Special Session, as dictated by Governor DeSantis, to take action on the pandemic. Are they considering how to improve vaccination rates? No. Are they discussing how to protect children in our schools? No. Are they debating the best ways to support working families as our economy recovers? Also no! Instead, Republicans are pushing to defy federal government guidance about pandemic safety. **Let me be clear, the Republicans’ real goal this week is to help Governor DeSantis’s political career, and frankly, I’m disgusted.** **[Today, we’re asking you to sign a petition calling for DeSantis to back down from these partisan political efforts and instead focus on helping Floridians that need support from the federal and state government. Will you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676232/316563300/-1352489512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU0ZjM0My1lZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lWFa7duPcbjs47sO9nkaPuKZJayyiUfyh3eo9dZQnrA=&emci=ea386453-4146-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9254f343-ef46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1139417)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676234/316563302/-1352489512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU0ZjM0My1lZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lWFa7duPcbjs47sO9nkaPuKZJayyiUfyh3eo9dZQnrA=&emci=ea386453-4146-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9254f343-ef46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1139417) On top of creating barriers for businesses to keep their employees and customers safe, DeSantis and Republicans are also laying the groundwork for Florida to withdraw from the federal Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA). **This move is DANGEROUS for all Floridians.** OSHA was established by President Nixon in 1970 and works to protect worker safety and health. Over the last 50 years, OSHA has prevented workplace injuries, protected countless whistleblowers, and created standards for training and worker education. Florida’s withdrawal would be a major loss for all workers across our state. **We cannot allow DeSantis to dismantle our labor protections just for his own political gain.** [**Please, will you stand with us and call for these bills to fail? Sign our petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38676236/316563304/-1352489512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU0ZjM0My1lZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lWFa7duPcbjs47sO9nkaPuKZJayyiUfyh3eo9dZQnrA=&emci=ea386453-4146-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9254f343-ef46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1139417) clean_body: Sign our petition about this wrong-headed Special Session Dear friends, This week, the Florida legislature will be holding a Special Session, as dictated by Governor DeSantis, to take action on the pandemic. Are they considering how to improve vaccination rates? No. Are they discussing how to protect children in our schools? No. Are they debating the best ways to support working families as our economy recovers? Also no! Instead, Republicans are pushing to defy federal government guidance about pandemic safety. Let me be clear, the Republicans’ real goal this week is to help Governor DeSantis’s political career, and frankly, I’m disgusted. On top of creating barriers for businesses to keep their employees and customers safe, DeSantis and Republicans are also laying the groundwork for Florida to withdraw from the federal Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA). This move is DANGEROUS for all Floridians. OSHA was established by President Nixon in 1970 and works to protect worker safety and health. Over the last 50 years, OSHA has prevented workplace injuries, protected countless whistleblowers, and created standards for training and worker education. Florida’s withdrawal would be a major loss for all workers across our state. We cannot allow DeSantis to dismantle our labor protections just for his own political gain. Thank you, Eric Lynn = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress Eric Lynn for Congress PO Box 16991 St. Petersburg, FL 33733 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

After months, and months, and months of negotiations, we’ve finally passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. It’s a great first step to fix our crumbling infrastructure — even Mitch McConnell realized he had to vote for it, which just goes to show how badly we need this legislation. But it’s just that: a first step. Infrastructure in the 21st century means so much more than roads and bridges. Nowadays, it includes universal child care, so parents can go to work and not worry about their kids while they’re on the clock. It includes tackling the climate crisis, which threatens not only our economy, but the survival of our planet. And we’ve got to pay for it in a way that starts to un-rig our tax laws, which are slanted to benefit the rich and powerful. So I’m focused on the next bill we’ve got to pass: the Build Back Better plan. I’m working to make sure it includes big pieces like quality, affordable child care — paid for with a minimum tax on corporations with more than $1 billion in profits, so Amazon can’t get away with paying $0 again. And this bill gives us a chance to take a big swing at solving the climate crisis. **This is how we build a future for all of our kids. I’ll keep up the fight in Washington, but I can’t do it alone.** [_**That’s why, if you’re able to, I’m asking if you can pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense to support our re-election campaign and elect more progressive leaders who share our values. Your support would go a long way towards making the big, structural change we need.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38677848/316570201/1935508075?refcode=EMZ1X_BIF_E_20211116_V1S1_re&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTlhMDJjZi1mMjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hXHbLoOk6EVmb_Mic_rYaiV_4OND5Ah2SA5FP1VQX8=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Losing ground in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

If these past Pennsylvania elections are any indicator of what's coming next, we're in trouble.

Headline after headline announces the bitter truth, that recent conservative wins point in the wrong direction for progressives. From judges to the gubernatorial races — things continue to look, well, very bad. Suburban Pennsylvanians who rallied against Trump are still hitting the polls, but not in support of causes that we believe in.

We have to step it up right now. If conservatives win up and down the ballot, then we can easily lose abortion rights in PA, and we'll backslide on voting rights, workers' rights — all of our rights. Keystone Progress is stepping up by empowering and mobilizing voters through on-the-ground Get Out The Vote efforts, including key coalition-building and organizer training sessions to get progressives to the polls.

Please help us gain back the ground we've lost in PA with a donation TODAY. There is simply too much at stake to do nothing.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=20] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=30] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111621]

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Dan Goldman
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — When I first became Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, I knew who my first hire and lead counsel would be: Dan Goldman. Dan served as the lead counsel for the House’s first Impeachment Inquiry into President Donald J. Trump, and he fought tirelessly by my side to ensure that nobody was above the law. Not even the president. This morning, Dan is taking that promise and fight to a new stage, as he announced his run for Attorney General in the state of New York. And I’m proud to be the first one to endorse Dan. **Dan Goldman stood by my side in the fight against Donald Trump’s corruption, and I am standing by his side now. Can you chip in $10 today to help him win this vital race?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Dan Goldman will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38681364/316585876/268359177?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211116_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJjMDgzMy1mYjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=525G6VIbaj7LsSpPreRb-XESBOPRwjLFEvIwYxwarM8=)

The New York Attorney General’s office is one of the most important offices in the country. It oversees Wall Street, leads some of the biggest lawsuits into corporate greed and malfeasance, fights for racial justice, and breaks new ground in the fight for truth and justice in our court system.
As a federal prosecutor, Dan showed no fear, even when he was prosecuting the Genovese crime family. He went after Wall Street insider trading. And he won every single time.
Dan then worked side by side with me to prosecute the case against Donald Trump. And it was his skill, keen insight and immense dedication that helped lead to the first bipartisan vote to convict a president. Ever.
Dan is ready for this next fight. And he’s the perfect person for the job. I just know it.
For far too long, there have been two standards of justice. One for the rich and powerful, and one for everyone else. Dan knows how wrong that is, and knows it is the fight of his life.
That’s why Dan’s running for Attorney General, and that’s why I’m so proud to endorse him.
**I hope that you will share my confidence that Dan Goldman is the absolute right person to be New York’s next Attorney General. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 to his campaign and ours right now. It’s critical that he has as strong a launch as possible. Please:**

---
Thanks for helping Dan as he begins his campaign for Attorney General and his next step in service. It means so much to me, and I know it means a lot to him.
— Adam
P.S. I wanted to share with you a personal moment, one the public has never seen before. Just minutes after our trial against Trump ended, I thanked the staff who brought us to that moment. Dan and I imparted to the team why what we did mattered so much. How nobody was above the law, and even if Republicans let Trump off the hook, we had made the case to the American people.
We were exhausted. But before he left for New York late that evening to go back to his wife and kids, I thanked Dan for what he did. Because without him, it wouldn’t have been such a successful vindication of our constitution and Democracy. Here’s that special moment. (Yes, I look incredibly tired ... because I was, and yes, Dan looked like he’s ready for his next fight. Because he is. That fight begins now.)
Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Dan Goldman will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The New York Attorney General’s office is one of the most important offices in the country. It oversees Wall Street, leads some of the biggest lawsuits into corporate greed and malfeasance, fights for racial justice, and breaks new ground in the fight for truth and justice in our court system. As a federal prosecutor, Dan showed no fear, even when he was prosecuting the Genovese crime family. He went after Wall Street insider trading. And he won every single time. Dan then worked side by side with me to prosecute the case against Donald Trump. And it was his skill, keen insight and immense dedication that helped lead to the first bipartisan vote to convict a president. Ever. Dan is ready for this next fight. And he’s the perfect person for the job. I just know it. For far too long, there have been two standards of justice. One for the rich and powerful, and one for everyone else. Dan knows how wrong that is, and knows it is the fight of his life. That’s why Dan’s running for Attorney General, and that’s why I’m so proud to endorse him. I hope that you will share my confidence that Dan Goldman is the absolute right person to be New York’s next Attorney General. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 to his campaign and ours right now. It’s critical that he has as strong a launch as possible. Please: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Dan Goldman will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for helping Dan as he begins his campaign for Attorney General and his next step in service. It means so much to me, and I know it means a lot to him. — Adam P.S. I wanted to share with you a personal moment, one the public has never seen before. Just minutes after our trial against Trump ended, I thanked the staff who brought us to that moment. Dan and I imparted to the team why what we did mattered so much. How nobody was above the law, and even if Republicans let Trump off the hook, we had made the case to the American people. We were exhausted. But before he left for New York late that evening to go back to his wife and kids, I thanked Dan for what he did. Because without him, it wouldn’t have been such a successful vindication of our constitution and Democracy. Here’s that special moment. (Yes, I look incredibly tired ... because I was, and yes, Dan looked like he’s ready for his next fight. Because he is. That fight begins now.) name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: I am beyond nervous right now
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58785677:JQse6e2N_:m:1:3253819041:6B054F41AACD249ECB0FBF1127A13F0F:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments, the jury is deliberating, and I am beyond nervous.

While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life.

**This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and I'm reaching out with an emergency request to help ensure it doesn't bury us.**

We're already expecting legal costs of about $110,000 for November, but if we can find another 1,500 people to donate over the next 24 hours, we should be okay.

**[Will you please help right now? $50 or any amount will go a long a way.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58785677:JQse6e2N_:m:1:3253819041:6B054F41AACD249ECB0FBF1127A13F0F:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58785677:JQse6e2N_:m:1:3253819041:6B054F41AACD249ECB0FBF1127A13F0F:r)
|
---
Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were.

And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see.

We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight.

**[Everything is coming to a head right now, and so I ask you, as strongly as I possibly can, to help with a donation of whatever you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58785677:JQse6e2N_:m:1:3253819041:6B054F41AACD249ECB0FBF1127A13F0F:r)**

Thank you for your unbelievable generosity.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments, the jury is deliberating, and I am beyond nervous. While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life. This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and I'm reaching out with an emergency request to help ensure it doesn't bury us. We're already expecting legal costs of about $110,000 for November, but if we can find another 1,500 people to donate over the next 24 hours, we should be okay. | | Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were. And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see. We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight. Thank you for your unbelievable generosity. Hello Friend,
In less than a year, Southern Arizonans will have a new Member of Congress representing them. We have the power to decide _now_ who that representative will be: **Kirsten Engel, someone who understands the needs of everyday Arizonans and who will always prioritize them OR a Republican who supports the GOP's extremists ideals and conspiracy theories.**
We’ve seen firsthand how far the Arizona GOP and national Republicans are willing to go to gain power, using the most extreme tactics and dark money-funded attacks. Everything we’ve fought for and accomplished is at stake.
And while other campaigns may be happy to take money from whoever offers, Kirsten is proud to have a campaign powered by grassroots donors. That's why, with less than a year to go, I have to ask: [**will you chip in today to make sure Kirsten has the resources she needs to keep this seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38683566/316589402/558373307?refcode=X_111621_AYearOut&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY4MTY5Zi1mZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAEyiSJQqmlAVXanuvIr-HK3Z5LIiOvHETdYi4HmLZ4=)

body:
“Build Back Broke” is the recurring theme of Biden and Nancy’s massive spending bill.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CcfboqGYF_ep2I9QPwzULlXzKx-dF7lw5i91m6kmwrQsE9VdEoeEl-3Q2OrQTR4nfVVH0fmvL6Tjes0c6uCSJNgLqZNRLs9ym7xlQ7Xg0iaOcesHufVD5oH8PPJw3NqsG-hLA9mB-F5gHjc6rqU14KZayGAcMCXmWQi5NWaiULwQaIfaJMAlaVBNzYI4S9KPUlkLmkGRgJc=&c=u1ShoEPs0LCpaBVhyZuAIk4d4vFgFruXX_WBF4Z84T2oPd1I7ftyJA==&ch=NoVdrP2A_xLr-QRah_bAZl42iKg8BvzUbjbaZJS9VmKPqqT10ghOxQ==)

| Friend,
"Build Back Broke" is the recurring theme of Biden and Nancy's massive spending bill.
This ridiculous "legislation" is nothing more than pages and pages of complete garbage. I would be more than happy to go into detail on what's actually in this bill, but Nancy isn't allowing Congress to even read it.
The Radical Left is refusing to allow details of the bill to be read to the House floor because they don't want America to know what's in it. Despite constant "revisions", they're afraid of voters knowing the truth: This bill is little more than a trojan horse for Big Government Socialism.
---
| | | [FIGHT BIG GOVERNMENT SOCIALISM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CcfboqGYF_ep2I9QPwzULlXzKx-dF7lw5i91m6kmwrQsE9VdEoeEl-3Q2OrQTR4nfVVH0fmvL6Tjes0c6uCSJNgLqZNRLs9ym7xlQ7Xg0iaOcesHufVD5oH8PPJw3NqsG-hLA9mB-F5gHjc6rqU14KZayGAcMCXmWQi5NWaiULwQaIfaJMAlaVBNzYI4S9KPUlkLmkGRgJc=&c=u1ShoEPs0LCpaBVhyZuAIk4d4vFgFruXX_WBF4Z84T2oPd1I7ftyJA==&ch=NoVdrP2A_xLr-QRah_bAZl42iKg8BvzUbjbaZJS9VmKPqqT10ghOxQ==)

| The reality is that this bill would cripple our economy and massively burden working-class families. The majority of the spending in this bill goes towards reshaping our economy and destroying our energy independence.
I have zero problems with furthering education, however, Nancy is forgetting to mention that she is going to have YOU pay for it. None of the "reforms" in this bill are actually free as the Left has been saying. Their plan will be to increase taxes on the working class.
As a victim of Obama-era Socialism, I refuse to stand by and let more Americans become victims of big government interference. This bill is a continuation of the Radical Left's push for more control over your daily life. We must stand and fight these brazen attacks on our financial independence.
[Can I count on your support in my fight against the Build Back Broke bill?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CcfboqGYF_ep2I9QPwzULlXzKx-dF7lw5i91m6kmwrQsE9VdEoeEl-3Q2OrQTR4nfVVH0fmvL6Tjes0c6uCSJNgLqZNRLs9ym7xlQ7Xg0iaOcesHufVD5oH8PPJw3NqsG-hLA9mB-F5gHjc6rqU14KZayGAcMCXmWQi5NWaiULwQaIfaJMAlaVBNzYI4S9KPUlkLmkGRgJc=&c=u1ShoEPs0LCpaBVhyZuAIk4d4vFgFruXX_WBF4Z84T2oPd1I7ftyJA==&ch=NoVdrP2A_xLr-QRah_bAZl42iKg8BvzUbjbaZJS9VmKPqqT10ghOxQ==)

name: Madison Horn via madisonhorn.com
subject: Welcome to the Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| | Madison Horn is running to represent all Oklahomans in the Senate. She will need a lot of grassroots support to win in November, 2022. We appreciate you being a part of our team, but if you’d like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/34a379a4-313b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/d084601b-ff46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDg0NjAxYi1mZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5dtoXb0ZBH1w5qw8ErUHL7wiYGTmS06fCk663mUadg=&id=106966782)
---
**Welcome to Team Madison! Since announcing my run to be the first woman to represent Oklahoma (the 46th state) within the U.S. Senate, the team has hit the ground running to meet hard-working people across our great state of Oklahoma. **

I, Madison Horn, am running to represent everyday Oklahomans — bringing your struggles, triumphs, and stories with me to Washington. By working together to unite Oklahomans, we can fight inequity, defend our country, and build a brighter Oklahoma for the next generation together!

**But I can’t do that if I don’t know your top priorities.[As a new member of the team, I want to speak directly to the issues that matter most to you. Please, can you let me know your top policy priorities by tonight? We need 1,000 responses to be statistically relevant.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38684440/316591032/960145468?utm_source=mh_em_sv_1dntl_211101_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_SV_1DNTL_211101_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDg0NjAxYi1mZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5dtoXb0ZBH1w5qw8ErUHL7wiYGTmS06fCk663mUadg=&emci=34a379a4-313b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d084601b-ff46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5119200)**
| [FILL ME IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38684443/316591033/960145468?utm_source=mh_em_sv_1dntl_211101_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_SV_1DNTL_211101_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDg0NjAxYi1mZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5dtoXb0ZBH1w5qw8ErUHL7wiYGTmS06fCk663mUadg=&emci=34a379a4-313b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d084601b-ff46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5119200)

As a lifelong Oklahoman and cybersecurity leader, I know the threats facing our communities: a rapidly fading American dream, government corruption, and foreign interference.

That’s why I’m committed to bringing political power back to Oklahoma — so the people most affected by government policy finally get a say.

clean_body: | | Madison Horn is running to represent all Oklahomans in the Senate. She will need a lot of grassroots support to win in November, 2022. We appreciate you being a part of our team, but if you’d like to unsubscribe from our emails, Welcome to Team Madison! Since announcing my run to be the first woman to represent Oklahoma (the 46th state) within the U.S. Senate, the team has hit the ground running to meet hard-working people across our great state of Oklahoma. I, Madison Horn, am running to represent everyday Oklahomans — bringing your struggles, triumphs, and stories with me to Washington. By working together to unite Oklahomans, we can fight inequity, defend our country, and build a brighter Oklahoma for the next generation together! But I can’t do that if I don’t know your top priorities. | As a lifelong Oklahoman and cybersecurity leader, I know the threats facing our communities: a rapidly fading American dream, government corruption, and foreign interference. That’s why I’m committed to bringing political power back to Oklahoma — so the people most affected by government policy finally get a say. Thank you for supporting our movement "For a United Oklahoma"! Madison Horn | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by = Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States **

name: Team Ben
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38684692/316591359/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211116_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjMyNTczYi1mZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQs-LDspwX195sRiov29VEPMQG41r-yfgfkwQG6i1UA=)
Hey folks, do you want to hear the good news or the bad news first? **Okay, we’ll start with the good news: We launched our Racial Justice Action Plan yesterday** , Ben’s framework for how to tackle systemic racism, economic and social inequities, and other disproportionate impacts on communities of color across the state. Our platform is grounded in the concrete recommendations of BIPOC communities and racial justice advocates, and emphasizes that the obligation to deliver racial justice in Massachusetts cannot fall exclusively on residents of color while white people sit on the sidelines. We’re refocusing our attention on what should matter most and working as a team, community, state, and society to effect transformational racial justice in Massachusetts. **The bad news:**
We missed our critical mid-quarter fundraising goal last night. This puts us in a bind because rolling out this action plan statewide and building a true movement on racial justice requires resources. From generational wealth gaps to inequity in the healthcare system to carceral reform, the fight for racial justice requires both immediate action, using the full powers of state government, and deliberate planning with partners who have devoted themselves to this work. **But some more good news:**
It’s not too late to fund our campaign’s community outreach program and ensure our movement for racial justice makes it to Beacon Hill. **Team, we can’t afford to have anyone sit this one out. Too many lives are on the line. Will you chip in $3 or more to help us close the gap and ensure we have the resources to share our Racial Justice Action Plan to build a more equitable and just Massachusetts?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38684693/316591360/-778200516?express_lane=true&amount=3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20211116_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjMyNTczYi1mZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQs-LDspwX195sRiov29VEPMQG41r-yfgfkwQG6i1UA=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: The strength of Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Its people mean everything | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cded64fec806/the-strength-of-minnesota?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Today I reflect on our campaign stops in Northern Minnesota this past weekend. Sixteen or more hours on the campaign trail and I don’t tire of learning about the issues Minnesotans care about! Minnesota is a marvel with its lakes and forests and prairies and mountains! But most of all, its people are our true strength! From Duluth, to Proctor, to Silver Bay to Cloquet, I was blown away and humbled by the support our campaign saw!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| My message to Minnesotans throughout the state, no matter where they live, is this: government does _not_ know better than _you_ when it comes to running your life! Miners should mine, farmers should farm, teachers should teach --- and government should get out of the way! That's what a "Scott Jensen" administration will unlock for Minnesota families.

Please click the thumbnail below and check out why I stand with Northern Minnesota and the people of Minnesota!**I hear you:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e34c2e4d16&e=33b11688c1)
---
| What is absolutely clear: we need to unify behind a candidate who can beat Tim Walz. The path he has put us down and his destructive policies are untenable! It doesn't matter where you live in Minnesota; you've felt the effects of an opaque and hostile government. I will be an advocating voice for ALL Minnesotans - and together, we will heal our state!

Your Fellow Minnesotan,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor
---

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: I am beyond nervous right now
body:
Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments and I am beyond nervous.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl30s8qni8frs0d4ierh8051jr9f55a9qbqselho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr9dphmeqbfcb1eiq32sb7mdoe2odh6krrapdmcdp7ddplcoom8ptk6hprdc5n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj38ppl6orrco3662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjm0o76c1g68oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhr3pinvu24td4b60mkdrivlggncmtvckprdlfbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments and I am beyond nervous.

While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life.

**[This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and I'm reaching out with an emergency request to help ensure it doesn't bury us.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztg1ikmivkf1av5sga6qnebrsat2vpm02f7t5mao_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)**

We're already expecting legal costs of about $110,000 for November, but if we can find 2,500 people to donate over the next 48 hours, we should be okay.

**[Will you please help right now? $50 or any amount will go a long a way.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zujun2o5u04p8o1r40b0fbb4fnief1cr56cjnhog_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg5lbrmntetuqsqfj4sjmm2idepkcvtlju9v5l8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)
|
---
Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were.

And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see.

We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight.

**[Everything is coming to a head right now, and so I ask you, as strongly as I possibly can, to help with a donation of whatever you can.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdg8k6cl232v7qcc8al3blqdh7vtdhnnui4vcbvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)**

Thank you for your unbelievable generosity.

No matter what happens, we will never, ever forget it.

Sincerely,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjtb7negi976siuur2gk9t7j661actordipr952o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco30chh2bs)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Climate is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator should be someone who puts people before big oil and gas CEOs
#

Folks,
Joe Manchin is at it again.
Just after President Joe Biden announced his pledge to reduce the United States’ methane emissions by 30 percent over the next nine years, Manchin signaled he won’t support anything that upsets big oil and gas companies.
[If you think Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator should be someone who puts people before big oil and gas CEOs, will you chip in $3 to help elect Malcolm Kenyatta?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687408/316595567/-360183459?refcode2=40020945-0347-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211116-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAyMDk0NS0wMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MnhzN-2kx7PF0IxIVriP98WA8HI9HNXciVvoTnUATU=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687412/316595572/-360183459?refcode2=40020945-0347-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211116-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAyMDk0NS0wMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MnhzN-2kx7PF0IxIVriP98WA8HI9HNXciVvoTnUATU=)**
Our planet is rapidly approaching the point of no return as global temperatures continue to rise.
Scientists tell us we only have a short window of time to act to reverse the effects of climate change — and economists say that if we don’t act, we could face tens of trillions of dollars in lost economic activity worldwide.
As a Pennsylvania Climate Power co-chair, Malcolm is one of the only candidates in this race who opposes fracking.
He knows that creating sustainable communities and building good-paying green jobs go hand and hand.
And he supports investment in green union jobs for workers leaving the fossil fuel industry, accountability for the communities poisoned by fossil fuel extraction, and innovation to meet this moment.
[But Malcolm needs our help to take our fight for climate action to the U.S. Senate. Can you pitch in $3 to fuel our campaign to victory today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687413/316595574/-360183459?refcode2=40020945-0347-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211116-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAyMDk0NS0wMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MnhzN-2kx7PF0IxIVriP98WA8HI9HNXciVvoTnUATU=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687414/316595575/-360183459?refcode2=40020945-0347-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211116-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAyMDk0NS0wMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MnhzN-2kx7PF0IxIVriP98WA8HI9HNXciVvoTnUATU=)**
Thank you,
Team Malcolm

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Will you help send a SEAL to Washington, D.C?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Because it’s time politicians put America first, not themselves!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf5d37s6auvi0bre1c3dld2q8e0sk0mcbgalbql8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmclh66ttmm5r74c7463ir2sj4meqn1ob6ccob2cpk6pirdd5k6iq79ohie8qmfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr66hjjacb0eth6cdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9hvph9vof8ec4qh0krob08lc13bn1ocqvod8kd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi6cva4oiso11q4dv89nlm4lapdflmnhdl7i367g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
Hey there, it's Derrick Van Orden.

I'm a retired Navy SEAL, Afghanistan War Veteran & Trump-endorsed conservative running to beat Pelosi. I'm a Navy SEAL, so I'm not someone who usually reaches out like this, **[but I'm asking if you will help with just $5?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z37hhprk60p7kntll73dg0la7aaa4g03s6uatu18_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "but I'm asking if you will help with just $5?")**

I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and ask you to join my team of grassroots supporters. Because if I am going to fight back against the Radical Left's attacks, I need people like you, in my corner.

I first answered the call to serve my country at 18 when I enlisted in the US Navy. And after 26 years of military service including multiple combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I am ready to continue serving this great country in Congress.

---
| [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5k54rgamdp71s9u8aegm32nhf57t27cv684smco_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3vkbs6c7dm3s9n5420h2fa6l7rp0bbhcoir5v80_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
But my race will be one of the toughest for Republicans anywhere this time around. Because here's the thing: liberal mega donors already spent millions attacking me in 2020 and are ready to do the same again this year.

Listen, I'm no politician, just an everyday American who loves this country and has dedicated my life to serving it. And right now, America needs more patriots in congress who will put America first, not themselves.

**[I hate to ask, but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqcacfqtd8vl270l8ocp6g4sgilr4ni0rs18bueo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "I hate to ask, but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option. ")
** _SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn3fdnib7k7q2ejhdd02d1pgs9pv55o8hdniq738_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
So if you agree that we need more members of congress who put the country over themselves, then help send a Navy SEAL like me to Washington. Because America is on the line in this election, and we can't afford to sit on the sidelines.

Thank you,

Derrick Van Orden
Senior Chief Petty Officer, US Navy (ret.)
_ Derrick Van Orden is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy._
---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn4t91bdflq8e1fisunkshtfmjcepd71co0r0m6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zujelo44khmoh0gpq1qi6kgtu3nqgv1ijr7l9uro_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zepmdaeoe3261bb6drjah89ebicjk3ke2phtkjb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge4p72c3h2bs "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Jake Evans
subject: Critical question for you
body:
I have a serious question about the future of our country...
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
Joe Biden is a disaster.
He's confused and lost.
Biden needs pre-written note cards and a teleprompter to answer any question.
That's why I have an important question to ask you.
Do you think Joe Biden is fit to be President?

name: Celeste Fortenberry
subject: Please help us fight Biden's out-of-control FBI! Sender: Celeste Fortenberry
body:
Every time there’s a shady incident involving the FBI, I’m shocked. I probably shouldn’t be, but I am.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1u77jdaq7t96h7e2btpb7f74t80lmeom80aef9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onimsrj9o5i6lpbec9h69oj2s3n6do6asdjmjge4s9lmmor6o756gqr6tj4c5qj0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3immo6fdr3cor61cr0cuobapbi4no)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgeovhiqlqmsvvulb7998nrfi1ru8l5shvr8bpp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfufrs13dtrldp1lp4jqg1aosjkg6oq6gqqb462g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs) When I read about the FBI's predawn raid of Project Veritas founder James O'Keefe's apartment, I went numb with outrage--and fear. O'Keefe told Fox News that the FBI handcuffed him and threw him into the hallway, partially clothed, in front of his neighbors. They confiscated his phone and raided his apartment. It's a harsh pattern of abuse, weaponizing the FBI against political enemies. Like concerned parents at school board meetings. And many more. It sounds more like a police state than America. I'm married to Congressman Jeff Fortenberry, and I can still feel the fear I felt as FBI agents interrogated my husband in our living room. **And then they charged him, my good, conservative, Nebraska husband, with fake crimes.** | | | | [Support Jeff's Legal Defense Fund Now!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8aqmsqrhhfjvhff14p74f0ipac49qbpi4ik050_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)
---

O'Keefe said the process is the punishment. I totally get it. We are living it.

Every time there's a shady incident involving the FBI, I'm shocked. I probably shouldn't be, but I am.

Full disclosure: I wanted to be an FBI agent.

I know great FBI agents. That's why the ones who came to our house were able to deceive us. We hadn't done anything wrong. Jeff was trying to help them.

If the FBI can target journalists, and well-respected members of Congress like Jeff, and school parents...they can and will target ANY American.

I'm writing today to ask you, as a patriot who cares deeply about America, to [help Jeff fight these false charges and defeat Biden's politicized FBI and DOJ.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsnf4dbj748gohpkhfen3o9b623ek0f5lpehstbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)

**[Will you donate a generous gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now in support of Jeff's Legal Defense Fund?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8nh5ekujhpo9rio2nnp9238k11gh1tpsebf1rg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)**
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt3vgsoscohmmtunep0lfpti5m1kfud3ub7mlacg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)

We're an ordinary family, five kids and a dog in the great Great Plains state of Nebraska. We definitely don't have the small fortune necessary to pay for Jeff's massive legal bills.

If President Biden's FBI wins, I could lose my husband, our daughters could lose their dad, and America could lose a great statesman.

**[So please support my husband as he fights for his freedom and takes a stand for all Americans whose liberty will be in peril if Biden and the Democrats continue weaponizing the FBI and DOJ.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zatbui69tjil3196nstgaa4k3kp3v1uku5jk4298_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)**

[Stand with Jeff by chipping in a generous gift of $10, $25, $50, or even...](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ilh7j9itvtpr53m38d3lmab8ktlrtbv4q1phh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs)

Thank you for all your well wishes, emotional support, and prayers.

And thank you in advance for standing with Jeff by making a [generous gift of support](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z50i403n3a2q3rop2ko4kdfg6gkchj9k7pho6jao_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco72c1h2bs) that we'll use to help fund his Legal Defense Fund!

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: I am beyond nervous right now
body:
Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments and I am beyond nervous.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zurpq553q3var8bk5m9uvjekld2l1bucdbe69lo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco74cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

Both the prosecution and my son Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments and I am beyond nervous.

While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life.

**[This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and I'm reaching out with an emergency request to help ensure it doesn't bury us.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zckhu5j25kuai90jovspg2ah1gq07itamd9rqnj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco74cjh2bs)**

We're already expecting legal costs of about $110,000 for November, but if we can find 2,500 people to donate over the next 48 hours, we should be okay.

**[Will you please help right now? $50 or any amount will go a long a way.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztmj9irnbmc021rupgu7jgjqah70sffhqqv164k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco74cjh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ina6fm4s6rfd7c5ulo089qc59r9itpaap6e4e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco74cjh2bs)
|
---
Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were.

And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see.

We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight.

**[Everything is coming to a head right now, and so I ask you, as strongly as I possibly can, to help with a donation of whatever you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zme6bnn9iksonirkskm3iu5npa8c7ktumvaf7qoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1geco74cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your unbelievable generosity.

No matter what happens, we will never, ever forget it.

Sincerely,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

| We wanted to make sure you saw Dr. Martin’s reflections last week at the one-year mark, Peter. It’s going to be a long, hard-fought race over the next year, but with Tennesseans like you and your neighbors on our side against Bill Lee’s dark money machine, __we can win this__ , and finally deliver honest, compassionate leadership to our state. [**Will you step up and help us show the grassroots, small-dollar power behind this campaign with a donation of just $3.57, one cent for every day left in the race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687724/316597242/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_l1&amount=3.57&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=) | [Give $3.57 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687725/316597243/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_btn&amount=3.57&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)

$3.57 might seem like an arbitrary number, but the exact dollar amount is much, much less important than what it stands for: A campaign by and for the Tennesseans, fueled by people like you and me giving whatever we're able, one, three, or fifteen dollars at a time. Bill Lee might have the corrupt GOP money machine behind him, but we've got the people. **That’s how we’re going to win this.**
Thanks for being a part of our movement.
\--------Forwarded message--------
From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: November 8, 2021
Subject: One year from today
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687726/316597244/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)
---
**One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor.**
At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months.
When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness.
At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education.
These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687727/316597251/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687728/316597258/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687729/316597265/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)
---
I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean.
I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. **And here’s what I know to be true:**
We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans.
We can thrive with better healthcare.
We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families.
And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure.
**Together, Tennessee thrives.**
Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state.
— Dr. Martin
P.S. One of the best ways you can help our campaign sustain momentum over the next year is by making a recurring donation.**[Even signing up to give $10 every month](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687730/316597272/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)** goes a long way towards fueling our operations and efforts to reach Tennesseans where they are.
[MAKE A RECURRING DONATION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38687731/316597276/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2rs_MFTweb_full_SLA_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJlNjhhMS0wNjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBbFML5uUElN26hLiw_Lq0RhNzrWhAl22MJoJ_2GHdM=)

Bill Lee might have the corrupt GOP money machine behind him, but we've got the people. That’s how we’re going to win this. Thanks for being a part of our movement. \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Dr. Jason Martin Date: November 8, 2021 Subject: One year from today = One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor. At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months. When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness. At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education. These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far: = = = I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean. I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. And here’s what I know to be true: We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans. We can thrive with better healthcare. We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families. And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure. Together, Tennessee thrives. Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state. — Dr. Martin P.S. One of the best ways you can help our campaign sustain momentum over the next year is by making a recurring donation.= goes a long way towards fueling our operations and efforts to reach Tennesseans where they are. = | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mark Holland
subject: Jerry Moran folded up like a lawn chair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/96c5a7c1-0447-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/8b3e7e24-0747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNlN2UyNC0wNzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5vSyxWHRMn5psKu1pN0BTNLQC2hr29wuKdd5mS_1NQ=&id=103697760)
---
| Dear friend —

When I served as Mayor of Kansas City, Kansas, we were fortunate because our local elections were non-partisan. We used to say all the time, “There is no Democrat or Republican way to pave a street.” Well, apparently in Jerry Moran's Washington, there is.

The new bi-partisan infrastructure bill was just signed into law by the President. It brings broadband internet to rural areas. Every business in Kansas benefits from the roads, bridges, and airports that are in place. Every Kansan — and every Kansas community — benefits from a robust education and healthcare system. In short, the infrastructure bill brings jobs to Kansas. Period.

Jerry Moran even helped author the infrastructure bill. Then, after one tweet from Donald Trump, he abandoned his state and even his fellow Republicans and voted against his own bill! **With one Tweet, Jerry Moran folded up like a lawn chair at a church picnic.**

[Please donate today to send a Kansas mayor’s commonsense and courage to Washington. We do not need a career politician whose focus is on his re-election and putting politics ahead of Kansas and America. **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

clean_body: Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | Dear friend — When I served as Mayor of Kansas City, Kansas, we were fortunate because our local elections were non-partisan. We used to say all the time, “There is no Democrat or Republican way to pave a street.” Well, apparently in Jerry Moran's Washington, there is. The new bi-partisan infrastructure bill was just signed into law by the President. It brings broadband internet to rural areas. Every business in Kansas benefits from the roads, bridges, and airports that are in place. Every Kansan — and every Kansas community — benefits from a robust education and healthcare system. In short, the infrastructure bill brings jobs to Kansas. Period. Jerry Moran even helped author the infrastructure bill. Then, after one tweet from Donald Trump, he abandoned his state and even his fellow Republicans and voted against his own bill! With one Tweet, Jerry Moran folded up like a lawn chair at a church picnic. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Mark Holland | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. On top of keeping our communities safe from COVID-19 and speeding up our economic recovery, Governor Hochul has ushered in a new era of transparency with a collaborative approach to governing.
These first 3 months in office haven’t been easy, but Governor Hochul hasn’t backed down in the fight for New York’s workers and families. **Now, we need to stand with her and help her achieve even more progress for New Yorkers.**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The bipartisan infrastructure bill is a game changer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friends, Yesterday, President Biden signed the bipartisan infrastructure bill into law. This package is a game changer for New Hampshire and the entire country, and **I'm proud to have been a part of the bipartisan group of Senators who helped negotiate it.** This vital infrastructure package will help rebuild America's roads and bridges, invest in clean energy and drinking water, ensure every American has access to high-speed internet, address climate change, and help America compete in the 21st-century economy. Not only will this much-needed legislation restore America's infrastructure, but it will also create new jobs and boost our economy. **And it was only possible because you made your voice heard, flipped the Senate, and won the White House.** Putting it simply, this infrastructure bill would not have passed without our majority. In 2022, Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control — and I'm at the top of their list. **[So before I go any further, can you please chip in $5 today to protect this seat and our majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38689246/316603253/-1803038125?refcode=e20211116_mwh-bif-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxZjRiMC0wODQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-AyUmJRjXf3NhsxjNJ9gJZRPXI77JBYIFGtWadmNOc=)** Because Democrats have the majority, we’ve been able to invest in moving our country forward through critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan and yesterday's once-in-a-generation bipartisan infrastructure plan. But Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are working hard to unseat me and take back the Senate. So far, GOP super PACS and outside interest groups have spent over **$4.5 million** rallying their far-right base and trying to tarnish my record. If I lose, we could lose our Senate majority and all the progress Democrats have worked so hard to make. **[That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask if you can help us protect this seat and our vulnerable Senate majority by donating today. Whatever you give makes a big difference in a race this important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38689247/316603254/-1803038125?refcode=e20211116_mwh-bif-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxZjRiMC0wODQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-AyUmJRjXf3NhsxjNJ9gJZRPXI77JBYIFGtWadmNOc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38689248/316603255/-1803038125?refcode=e20211116_mwh-bif-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxZjRiMC0wODQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-AyUmJRjXf3NhsxjNJ9gJZRPXI77JBYIFGtWadmNOc=)

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Chris is counting on us to have his back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Last week, GOP leaders made it clear that Chris and this Maryland Senate seat have become key targets of Mitch McConnell's recruitment efforts to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans in 2022. One important way we can show that we are prepared to run a strong statewide campaign to re-elect Chris is by hitting our monthly fundraising goals so we have the resources needed to set the record straight when the attack ads come our way. Another way is by having grassroots supporters like you personally endorse our campaign and sign on to say you’ll have Chris’s back in this critical upcoming midterm election. It may seem like a small action, but your personal endorsement, together with other voters, is a powerful statement about what this campaign stands for — harnessing our collective power to make change happen. Together we can re-elect Chris, defend our Senate majority, and move forward with the critical work of protecting and strengthening our democracy and improving the lives of hardworking Americans. clean_body: | | Last week, GOP leaders made it clear that Chris and this Maryland Senate seat have become key targets of Mitch McConnell's recruitment efforts to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans in 2022. One important way we can show that we are prepared to run a strong statewide campaign to re-elect Chris is by hitting our monthly fundraising goals so we have the resources needed to set the record straight when the attack ads come our way. Another way is by having grassroots supporters like you personally endorse our campaign and sign on to say you’ll have Chris’s back in this critical upcoming midterm election. It may seem like a small action, but your personal endorsement, together with other voters, is a powerful statement about what this campaign stands for — harnessing our collective power to make change happen. name: Nikki Fried
subject: As governor, I’m not going to waste your time
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

Yesterday, the Florida Legislature gavelled in an unnecessary and politically-motivated special session called by Governor DeSantis. The governor called this session to pick a fight with the Biden administration and score points with Fox News viewers. What a dangerous waste of our time.

I’m writing today with a promise: as governor, I’m not going to waste your time. Instead, I’m going to use my years of experience fighting for what’s right to tackle our state’s most pressing issues.

There’s so much at stake in Florida right now. Instead of playing politics with this pandemic, we should be fighting for our environment, working together to give every family a fair shot, and protecting our democracy.

I’ve spent my life standing up for what’s right, from the University of Florida to the courtroom to the halls of the Florida Capitol. I’m going to do the same thing as your governor--even if it’s not politically convenient.

This week is a wake-up call, friends. With all the challenges we’re facing, politicians like DeSantis are wasting our time and our money to score political points. If you agree it’s time for something new, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1116special]

I’ve been underestimated my entire life, team. Pundits and political insiders are underestimating this campaign too.

But friends, no one should ever bet against a movement of Floridians fighting for change.

I hope you’re with us on this. Thanks so much for your support.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

subject: Why being a teacher will make me a better representative than Kevin McCarthy.
body:
|

Friend,

**[This is a long, but important email about the approach I will take in Congress. Please take a moment to read it, then consider chipping in $3 to help me meet my mid-quarter deadline to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38690020/316606610/-787496292?refcode=em-111621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWQ0ODcwYy0wZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cbHp6wwzL7aQT5Bkh37IsQ8wVybtnkzRUsNYoCvv-o=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38690021/316606611/-787496292?refcode=em-111621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWQ0ODcwYy0wZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cbHp6wwzL7aQT5Bkh37IsQ8wVybtnkzRUsNYoCvv-o=)**
---

As a teacher of junior high English for 21 years, I'm privileged to spend every single day inspired by the youth in whom our future rests. My kiddos amaze me with their ability to adapt and push through challenges.

Getting them back to school this past year has been tough, and teachers are playing many new roles. We don't just teach -- we lend an ear to listen or sometimes even a shoulder to cry on.

Teachers know well that parents and kids in our community face complex issues. In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of everyone in this community. We need good jobs and dignified wages; accessible, affordable healthcare; quality education and resources for kids; and proper management of our land and water resources to keep them clean.

**Call me old fashioned, but I think this is how Congress should operate. My opponent Kevin McCarthy on the other hand answers to corporate and special interests who write large checks. He's blocking good legislation in DC because they depend on him returning the favor. It's that simple.**

It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. We must do something about it -- that's why I'm running for Congress and why I'm asking:

**[We're officially halfway through this fundraising quarter, but not yet halfway to the target we need to hit in order to meet our goal to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. Now that you know what type of congresswoman I'd be, can you kick in $3 today to help us meet the mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38690022/316606612/-787496292?refcode=em-111621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWQ0ODcwYy0wZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cbHp6wwzL7aQT5Bkh37IsQ8wVybtnkzRUsNYoCvv-o=)**
