clean_body: | = Friend, = | = As a teacher of junior high English for 21 years, I'm privileged to spend every single day inspired by the youth in whom our future rests. My kiddos amaze me with their ability to adapt and push through challenges. Getting them back to school this past year has been tough, and teachers are playing many new roles. We don't just teach -- we lend an ear to listen or sometimes even a shoulder to cry on. Teachers know well that parents and kids in our community face complex issues. In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of everyone in this community. We need good jobs and dignified wages; accessible, affordable healthcare; quality education and resources for kids; and proper management of our land and water resources to keep them clean. Call me old fashioned, but I think this is how Congress should operate. My opponent Kevin McCarthy on the other hand answers to corporate and special interests who write large checks. He's blocking good legislation in DC because they depend on him returning the favor. It's that simple. It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. We must do something about it -- that's why I'm running for Congress and why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. body:
#

Friend,
Earlier this month, Democrats passed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — and I couldn’t be prouder to help enact the largest investment in America’s infrastructure in the history of our nation.
Now, we’ll see millions of new, good-paying jobs, improvements to our public transportation systems, and critical repairs to our roads and bridges. These investments will make a major difference in New York’s 17th Congressional District as folks commute to and from New York City.
But unfortunately, all of the hard work we’ve achieved could be undone if Republicans take back control of Congress in 2022.
Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell are incredibly smug about their chances to win back the House and Senate, and they’re counting down the days until they can take back Congress and fight for tax cuts for the top one percent.

clean_body: Friend, Earlier this month, Democrats passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act — and I couldn’t be prouder to help enact the largest investment in America’s infrastructure in the history of our nation. Now, we’ll see millions of new, good-paying jobs, improvements to our public transportation systems, and critical repairs to our roads and bridges. These investments will make a major difference in New York’s 17th Congressional District as folks commute to and from New York City. But unfortunately, all of the hard work we’ve achieved could be undone if Republicans take back control of Congress in 2022. Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell are incredibly smug about their chances to win back the House and Senate, and they’re counting down the days until they can take back Congress and fight for tax cuts for the top one percent. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Our democracy is at stake, so we can’t let Republicans and the special interests that fund them win and chip away at our efforts to protect the American people. We’ve shown what our movement is capable of before and I believe that we can have another successful campaign if we re-commit to this fight today. Onwards, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Fellow Conservative,

Rep. Ilhan Omar, _member of the Democrat "Squad,"_ will be hosting a fundraiser for the swing state of Nevada in a desperate attempt to help the sinking Democrats and stop Republicans from flipping key House seats, _like my race in district 3._

| Friend
Senator Tom Cotton is one of the most fierce defenders of the Constitution in the United States Senate. I could not be more honored to have his endorsement.
"Tiffany has been a tireless advocate for veterans and has helped enact real reforms at the Veterans Administration to benefit our returning heroes. I'm glad that she is going to continue her service in the U.S. Senate and she has my full endorsement. I have no doubt that Tiffany will take this same commitment and work each day to improve the lives of Washington families. I am looking forward to working with Tiffany to help her win." \- Senator Tom Cotton
When I am elected, I look forward to joining Senator Cotton in fighting tirelessly for our veterans and ensuring that our heroes receive the care that they deserve.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2gbu2emnc6tst03mcomkhg8nip96b0dsjj44h38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfinr3kqli43tdb21oipqqpdhh4p2e8lf5fklcag_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ufi53arjksnsbc2e6uscgobgc0vp5t0f96uut8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkdel1023tdfr4pehma9446nbbjbql0humko50d8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs2jpjb64lm9l0el7sgqb46mtm2qfnt3nsjktr00_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Fellow American, You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government. “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” is a powerful counterweight to The New York Times’ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIwLTMyMzMwMDY3YjVkODRiNTI4NmJhMzgxYWVkNDEzOThk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb3JtYW4tZm9yLXBhLWdvdmVybm9yL2NhbXBhaWduLWFubm91bmNlbWVudD91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsaXQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjExMTE2X1NUQVRFUEFfYWVwYWNvb3B0ZG9ub3JzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aGE&K=_ce8lk1uSsw4uvvMHCbChQ)Dear Peter,
The past few years have been a whirlwind for all of us. Faced with a pandemic, supply shortages, and the growth of woke mob mentality, Americans are more in tune than ever with the leaders they choose to elect. As a proud Pennsylvanian serving our Commonwealth, I feel it is my duty to step up and do my part while our country is at this crossroads. **That is why I am proud to announce I’ll be running for Governor of Pennsylvania in the 2022 election.**[**Support My Campaign for Governor Today**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIwLTMyMzMwMDY3YjVkODRiNTI4NmJhMzgxYWVkNDEzOThk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb3JtYW4tZm9yLXBhLWdvdmVybm9yL2NhbXBhaWduLWFubm91bmNlbWVudD91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsaXQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjExMTE2X1NUQVRFUEFfYWVwYWNvb3B0ZG9ub3JzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aGE&K=VayTOStph21JCjPLDt9jVw) The state we know and love is falling victim to the disastrous policies of the Left. Conservatives like you and me, need to join together and fight against this infringement on our rights and identity. **** As the Republican leader of the State Senate, I led the fight against Tom Wolf’s efforts to raise taxes, defund our police, and push radical policies in education. **** I also spearheaded the push to pass first-in-the-nation legislation that stripped Governor Wolf of his emergency declaration powers. **** I plan to continue this fight for our freedoms on an even greater scale. But I need your help to get there. [**Will you join me in bringing positive change to Pennsylvania with an inaugural donation today?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIwLTMyMzMwMDY3YjVkODRiNTI4NmJhMzgxYWVkNDEzOThk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb3JtYW4tZm9yLXBhLWdvdmVybm9yL2NhbXBhaWduLWFubm91bmNlbWVudD91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsaXQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjExMTE2X1NUQVRFUEFfYWVwYWNvb3B0ZG9ub3JzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aGE&K=dYJlNmb0nX3_w510vV62VQ)[**Support My Campaign for Governor Today**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIwLTMyMzMwMDY3YjVkODRiNTI4NmJhMzgxYWVkNDEzOThk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jb3JtYW4tZm9yLXBhLWdvdmVybm9yL2NhbXBhaWduLWFubm91bmNlbWVudD91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsaXQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjExMTE2X1NUQVRFUEFfYWVwYWNvb3B0ZG9ub3JzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aGE&K=nnD3JOMk1pRXlaDiMGHM3g) Together we can strengthen our economy, protect our freedoms, and continue the American dream. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Coffee & Conversation
body:
Join me on Thursday for a conversation about last week's violence. | | | **Join me for coffee & conversation**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be11c2362e3a/coffee-conversation?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
# Join me this Thursday
As a community organizer, leader and candidate for Congress, I feel it is my duty to create space for us to talk about the recent violence and begin to heal our neighborhood. I'm not a mental health expert, so I recognize that it's not in my power to facilitate this conversation. Instead, I want to use my platform and network to collaborate with professionals who can lead us through this as a community.

I hope that you'll join me this **Thursday, 11/18 at 6:30pm at Philz Coffee on 1425 E. 53rd** to talk about this past week's events. **Jennifer Duran** , LCSW and **Tre Nowaczynski** , M.A. are Trauma Intervention Specialists with **Healing Hurt People Chicago** (HHPC), which is a hospital-based violence intervention program. They provide therapeutic support services to youth, young adults, and their families who have been impacted by community violence. Jennifer and Tre will engage participants in a trauma-informed conversation about the collective impact of community violence. We hope to have an open discussion related to alternative modes of healing and safety while thinking critically about systems that engage individuals and communities. Let us know you're coming by filling out [this short form](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=0be2d75cda&e=339f142c50). Please be aware that **we are requiring everyone to wear masks at this event** in accordance with the state mask mandate.

On a personal note, I want to say we can't just smile through this pain. When there's a shooting on our block or we lose someone to gun violence, the city and the nation pay attention to us for a few minutes before forgetting about us until the next time someone is killed. We can't let this continue.

Finally, I want to thank everyone for their kind words and support these past few days. I want to share my deepest condolences to the Hyde Park community, and the friends and family of the University of Chicago student who was killed last week.
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
| |
---
|
---

Yours in service, Jahmal Cole | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

|

We texted you yesterday asking if you'll accept President Trump's friend request but never heard back.

_**Peter, was this a mistake?**_ 98% accepted, so you are now in the bottom 2% of all Trump supporters.

Because you were one of the first to pledge to join Trump social, _**[we have resent your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788503:67VxYe2Nb:m:1:3298722022:94F6F97D76AFC568526FDF51B67492EA:r "we have resent
your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.")**_

body:
This Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help
| | |
---
Sorry to add another email to your inbox, friend, but **I have big news to share:**
A new poll shows Marco Rubio and I _neck and neck_ in this critical Senate race. We're gaining ground – but we're still in the margin of error, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says 2022 could be a red wave.
**I've overcome long odds before. **The daughter of a maid and a janitor, I became the first in my family to go to college. I became Orlando's first woman police chief – and I even prosecuted a corrupt president for his high crimes against our democracy.

**But there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help to go ALL IN and flip Florida blue. **
The GOP has already raised more than $76 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, flip the Senate and erase all of the critical progress we're making. Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months.
Senate control is on the line in Florida – and the GOP is terrified that we can defeat Marco Rubio. Florida's Senate seat will come down to who has the resources to turn out more voters, which is why I'm personally asking you right now: **Will you rush a donation to help me hit my $50,000 goal by midnight tonight, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority?**
**[Please, friend, I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help me compete and win. Whether you give $5 or $25, every dollar will help me keep pace with Rubio in the polls, flip Florida blue and defend the Senate for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38692174/316616406/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1707-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzM4NmJmYy0xNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RybZLMy6ZgBpy_zQq60PWP-6a46Jp9gM6p7nZyXUj_4=)**

name: Team Vasquez
subject: What Democrats have delivered on →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38692278/316616790/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211116midmonth2_TV_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWY2MTRmMS0xNTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxVjNGvo5bwTP_h9ui2_Jj_L2vagCqgoWhLRkzeNr_I=)
---
Team, When Democrats took back the House in 2018 with a blue wave at the polls, it was a pivotal moment for our country — and New Mexico’s 2nd District helped make it happen when we flipped this seat from red to blue. We were finally able to stop some of Donald Trump’s and Republicans’ most extreme agenda items, including their attempt to destroy the Affordable Care Act altogether. In 2020, our House majority shrunk when seats like this one flipped red again, but so far, Democrats have still been able to make historic change for our country, including passing _the biggest infrastructure package in decades_. With this $1.2 trillion bill, Democrats have delivered:
* Nationwide repairs to our crumbling roads and bridges, plus updates to public transit;
* High-speed broadband expansion to provide more affordable, high quality internet to underserved communities;
* Improvements to our water and energy infrastructure to ensure access to clean water and adapt to climate change.

**And we can achieve even more — like affordable healthcare, a $15 minimum wage, and stronger voting rights — as long as we keep the House blue next year.** [**Flipping this district again is crucial to defending our majority and continuing to make progress for the people. Will you help Gabe do it by chipping in $10 or more before our mid-month deadline tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38692279/316616791/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211116midmonth2_TV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWY2MTRmMS0xNTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxVjNGvo5bwTP_h9ui2_Jj_L2vagCqgoWhLRkzeNr_I=) **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We were finally able to stop some of Donald Trump’s and Republicans’ most extreme agenda items, including their attempt to destroy the Affordable Care Act altogether. In 2020, our House majority shrunk when seats like this one flipped red again, but so far, Democrats have still been able to make historic change for our country, including passing the biggest infrastructure package in decades. With this $1.2 trillion bill, Democrats have delivered: Nationwide repairs to our crumbling roads and bridges, plus updates to public transit; High-speed broadband expansion to provide more affordable, high quality internet to underserved communities; Improvements to our water and energy infrastructure to ensure access to clean water and adapt to climate change. And we can achieve even more — like affordable healthcare, a $15 minimum wage, and stronger voting rights — as long as we keep the House blue next year. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being part of this people-powered movement, Team Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | | | | | |

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58787307:6wIeue2NI:m:1:3253819041:5FFDAC9EC5D84407EA197A55B2F16933:r)

Peter,

Liberals think this is the new face of racism and white nationalism!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58787307:6wIeue2NI:m:1:3253819041:5FFDAC9EC5D84407EA197A55B2F16933:r)
I am a naturalized citizen from Jamaica who joined the United States Marine Corps because I wanted to put my life on the line to protect the values of this amazing country.

But the left said that you and I are invoking "white nationalism" and are a danger to our national security because we are Republicans.

They hate me because I refuse to fall into their victim-driven, racial narratives, and they hate you because you won't fall for their tricks!
[**TELL THE LEFT ENOUGH IS ENOUGH**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58787309:6wIeue2NI:m:1:3253819041:5FFDAC9EC5D84407EA197A55B2F16933:r)
---

It's obvious they are afraid of me, afraid of us!

Together, we're going to shut down the liberals' narratives.

**[Help me reject the left's lies about us! A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an enormous help in spreading my message.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58787307:6wIeue2NI:m:1:3253819041:5FFDAC9EC5D84407EA197A55B2F16933:r)**

We are the greatest nation on earth because of people like you; thank you!

Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears

body:
Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican incumbent Senator up in 2022, but you don't have to take our word for it:

**A new Marquette University Law School poll found that only 38% of registered voters would re-elect Ron Johnson -- 52% would vote for "someone else."** This is big news, and it proves what we've been saying all along: Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control.

Republicans need one seat to take back the majority. Major election forecasters are already calling Wisconsin's Senate race a toss-up, which makes our race one of the most competitive in the country — and it’s about to get even more expensive. Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat red.

Look, Wisconsin doesn’t do landslides, and beating a two-term incumbent with an unlimited amount of resources won't be easy. But Sarah is no stranger to building a winning campaign. She's the only candidate in this race to have won two statewide elections in Wisconsin, and with your help, she can do it again to defeat Ron Johnson.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: monthly Child Tax Credit payments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693494/316625603/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkZDIzZi0xYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hK608Fe_0piF6Dbi311luyfxys-jIhv1MPVUEKyTxIU=)
Folks, before I served Colorado as senator, I served Denver’s students as school superintendent. I began to notice a pattern from one high schooler. Morning after morning, he was falling asleep in class. He was clearly exhausted and when I asked what was going on, he revealed he’d been working the midnight shift at McDonald’s so his family had enough money to get by. I spent years fighting for the expanded Child Tax Credit because of stories like his and the fact that this is commonplace in our country. The monthly payments have helped one million Colorado kids and kept three million children out of poverty nationwide, this year alone. So in my negotiations for a further extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit, I’m thinking of the countless kids nationwide that won’t have to work the midnight shift and the parents who can help with homework because they didn’t have to pick up extra shifts because of the CTC. I secured an additional one-year expansion of the CTC in the budget bill that we’re working to pass here in Washington. I’ve seen firsthand how income inequality affects our kids, so this fight is personal. I’m running to meetings, making calls, and negotiating with the next generation in mind, but I haven’t had time to focus on my re-election efforts despite all that’s at stake. My team tells me that we just fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal but I know grassroots supporters like you have stepped up before. I appreciate every hard-earned dollar pitched into my campaign and hope you can donate before this month’s deadline. **If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to my re-election campaign. clean_body: | = Folks, before I served Colorado as senator, I served Denver’s students as school superintendent. I began to notice a pattern from one high schooler. Morning after morning, he was falling asleep in class. He was clearly exhausted and when I asked what was going on, he revealed he’d been working the midnight shift at McDonald’s so his family had enough money to get by. I spent years fighting for the expanded Child Tax Credit because of stories like his and the fact that this is commonplace in our country. The monthly payments have helped one million Colorado kids and kept three million children out of poverty nationwide, this year alone. So in my negotiations for a further extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit, I’m thinking of the countless kids nationwide that won’t have to work the midnight shift and the parents who can help with homework because they didn’t have to pick up extra shifts because of the CTC. I secured an additional one-year expansion of the CTC in the budget bill that we’re working to pass here in Washington. I’ve seen firsthand how income inequality affects our kids, so this fight is personal. I’m running to meetings, making calls, and negotiating with the next generation in mind, but I haven’t had time to focus on my re-election efforts despite all that’s at stake. My team tells me that we just fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal but I know grassroots supporters like you have stepped up before. I appreciate every hard-earned dollar pitched into my campaign and hope you can donate before this month’s deadline. If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to my re-election campaign. I’m fighting so our economy works for everyone, rather than a few at the top, and your support makes that possible. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Invasion of Privacy
body:
Democrats cannot stay out of our business
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WTNtuZKp_zFM92VANulGg9b8EFMfibC7FojNTELDpB8r3Hb6_XFw1ka5UsvzrnXuoQjnTDRjYmehveOMo5-q6mkVtCSLCQuFYPs667vH3BmPiANL4er-amr3ouX9wvQ_5N_xuvAi3iLsPsJhhsFx_Ss2De6QDQrk&c=0bgochgld_fBsTcKrWdxnEWREdXfPJ3iZDb3u6wTpoPkMCX8Z188eQ==&ch=cCQsAE-JYCkDe2shrMPY0VNgATxEvq4wH-XWIA1OGjhREce6QjfV0Q==)

|
---
|
# Taxing more is all Democrats know
---
Democrats cannot stay out of our business. Their goal is to tax, tax, and tax some more, so they can spend it on their pet projects, while laying a heavy burden on people, business and industry. Radical Left Democrats in power demonize prosperity while working to redistribute everyone's wealth but their own.
Unsurprisingly, the newly passed infrastructure bill contains more government invasion into our personal finances. It revises the 1984 tax code to force those involved in transactions who receive more than $10,000 in cash to report personal information about the sender to the IRS. This new rule includes cryptocurrency. This is a complete and Unconstitutional disregard for our right to privacy.
Offenders will face mandatory fines and up to five years in prison.
This is not about protecting you, your wealth, or your children's' future. This is all about control and protecting the power of those in charge. The Democrats are weaponizing the IRS as they attack freedom on all fronts, from colluding with Big Tech to censor free speech, to inhibiting our freedom to assemble, to attacking our right to bear arms. Now they are further attacking our rights to privacy. It seems their end goal is to ensure the government has ultimate power over how you spend your money.
At the same time, their reckless spending is out of control. And remember, they're spending our tax dollars while placing further debt-burden on our children. As spending continues to spiral upward, so does inflation. The government reported consumer prices soared 6.2% in October, the biggest jump in more than three decades. What does that mean? Your paycheck became worth less as the dollar lost value. Milk, gas, bread, toilet paper, and myriad other essentials are costing you more while your take-home pay doesn't go as far as it used to.
And now we are going into winter when home heating will cost up to 50% more than last year (in a country where natural gas is extremely plentiful).
Help me get the government out of your way. In the U.S. Senate I will stand against government oppression. As Ronald Reagan once said, "government is not the solution to our problem, government is the problem."

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Beto’s running for governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Beto O’Rourke just announced he’s running to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.

| | Derek, we have some exciting news:

**Beto O’Rourke just announced he’s running to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.**

The stakes couldn’t be higher in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott and the Texas GOP have ruthlessly attacked reproductive rights, undermined democracy, and failed to protect Texas families from the deadly Covid-19 pandemic. Families and communities in Texas deserve so much better — and that’s why Beto is in this fight.

Beginning with his insurgent 2018 U.S. Senate campaign that engaged millions of new voters across the Lone Star State, Beto has shown that he has what it takes to beat Greg Abbott and transform the broken status quo in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott is a prime example of an elected official who prioritizes himself and his wealthy friends over his constituents and their families.

We’ve seen it in Abbott’s failure to address Texas’ crumbling power grid, leading to catastrophic power outages and the death of hundreds of Texans in the winter of 2021. We saw it when he banned mask requirements in public schools, making Texas a national leader in child Covid deaths. And we saw it when he signed an unconstitutional law that bans most abortions in Texas. _**Derek, Texas deserves better.**_

But beating Republican incumbent Greg Abbott won’t be easy, especially since Abbott and his party have gone to great lengths to make voting more difficult than it ever should be. We’re going to need a huge amount of grassroots resources to build the kind of people-powered movement that can reach and mobilize millions of Texas voters.

[**This race is our best chance to take Texas back for working people and families. That’s why we’re asking if you’ll split a contribution between Beto and Common Good and become a founding donor today to help unseat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O’Rourke to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693602/316626072/-410225223?refcode=20211116_Beto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU2ZjEyMi0xYTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRCSrZIgbBgHAYSySLK_BF65jRPjwOUj1JYNVVBhkGw=)

With voting rights, reproductive justice, and so much more on the line in Texas, this race couldn’t be more important.

Thank you for doing your part,

Beto for Texas

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Nina Turner
subject: Elon Musk Has Some Damn Nerve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Bernie Sanders and our Progressive Movement will keep up the pressure on the ultra wealthy
#

Friends,

If you have been watching Twitter the last few days, you have seen Senator Sanders keep up the pressure to tax the ultra wealthy in this country. It is one of his usual weekly messages and all was well until the richest man in history scrolled by it on his phone.

Senator Sanders clearly hit a nerve and Elon Musk tried (and failed) to clap back.

“I keep forgetting you’re still alive”

**Elon Musk has some damn nerve!**
* Elon built his empire with **4.9B** subsidies from the government.
* In 2018 he paid **ZERO** in Taxes.
* He is engaged in a **space race** instead of helping address the issues of humanity right here on **Mother Earth.**
* Elon made more than **$228B** since the beginning of the pandemic while the working people of this country continue to suffer.

What Elon said is **UNACCEPTABLE.** Senator Bernard Sanders is very much alive - and so is the progressive movement!

One thing we know for sure, is that demanding the ultra wealthy pay their fair share is not only a popular sentiment but a necessary process to ensure that a bold agenda to lift the working people of this country is paid for.
[**Help us keep up the pressure and show Elon Musk just how alive our movement is. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693662/316626441/1761773496?refcode=211116_FR_elonmuskbernie&refcode2=cb537884-1c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUzNzg4NC0xYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=alWLFrEzpibvGvs0uLrTHGr_rSRrLKVq55uuHUu79rc=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693663/316626442/1761773496?refcode=211116_FR_elonmuskbernie_ELothr&express_lane=true&refcode2=cb537884-1c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUzNzg4NC0xYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=alWLFrEzpibvGvs0uLrTHGr_rSRrLKVq55uuHUu79rc=)**

body:
We are just a few hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. Over the past few days, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up and pitched in to help us hit our $10,000 goal and we're so grateful, but we're still coming up a little short: Peter,

We are just a few hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. Over the past few days, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up and pitched in to help us hit our $10,000 goal and we're so grateful, but we're still coming up a little short: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693942/316627580/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211116_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211116_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlhZmIwYy0xZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1MxJB3AVvjeYLwUTVwZByeFlBFeAso53GZPujWjZjoY=) This is the first deadline we've faced since learning that another Republican opponent has filed paperwork to run against Andy in 2023. Reaching our goal before tonight's deadline ensures we can make the early investments needed to build a winning campaign and protect the progress we're making for Kentuckians -- but we won't get there without the support of this grassroots team.

**[Can Andy count on your support before our midnight deadline? Rush a donation of $5 or more right away to help us close the gap on our mid-month fundraising goal so we can continue making progress for the Bluegrass state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693943/316627581/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211116_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211116_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlhZmIwYy0xZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1MxJB3AVvjeYLwUTVwZByeFlBFeAso53GZPujWjZjoY=)**

Over the past few days, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up and pitched in to help us hit our $10,000 goal and we're so grateful, but we're still coming up a little short: Peter, We are just a few hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. Over the past few days, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up and pitched in to help us hit our $10,000 goal and we're so grateful, but we're still coming up a little short: = This is the first deadline we've faced since learning that another Republican opponent has filed paperwork to run against Andy in 2023. Reaching our goal before tonight's deadline ensures we can make the early investments needed to build a winning campaign and protect the progress we're making for Kentuckians -- but we won't get there without the support of this grassroots team. = Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign. = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

**First:** Mike Garcia was elected to represent CA-25 in a special election.

**Then:** Christy Smith ran against him in 2020 and only lost by 333 votes.

**Now:** Mike Garcia is poised to lose the Republican stronghold in Simi Valley (home to Ronald Reagan) from CA-25 thanks to redistricting. Right now**,** the draft maps from the independent redistricting committee show the very voters who Mike relied on for his slight win are no longer a part of the district. Without them, he is poised to lose.

**That is big news for CA-25 -- if these maps are finalized this district will look a lot bluer -- just as experts have been predicting.** We know we have the momentum to win but we have to build the campaign to back it up, Peter.

**[We are a fighting force, one that's ready to make sure the people keep their power. We can't do it alone -- chip in $5 or whatever you can today and make sure we're able to build a campaign that can win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693958/316627625/-2052413565?refcode=em21_211116_rr-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODlhZmIwYy0xZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glBx5-hPs_c8teEtaJArmh12DxlsSJ5iJFgjC5_5G_Q=)**

Christy Smith is fighting for fair wages, prescription costs Americans can afford, reproductive rights, and so much more.

**She is the representative CA-25 deserves to have.**

**[And with these new maps, she will be the representative CA-25 gets, but we can't do it without you by our side. Chip in right now to ditch Mike Garcia and help us win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38693959/316627626/-2052413565?refcode=em21_211116_rr-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODlhZmIwYy0xZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glBx5-hPs_c8teEtaJArmh12DxlsSJ5iJFgjC5_5G_Q=)**

Thank you so much for your support,

\-- Team Christy

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A major Decision, Patriot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION to **29910****
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788687:6tkiEe2Nm:m:1:3299561967:B648021278406D8C1FB24CD322D57DB6:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

**He actively promoted violence against a sitting member of Congress and the President of the United States._[We need 100 signatures before midnight to sign on and DEMAND that Ann Wagner denounce his abhorrent tweet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38694356/316629697/263202716?refcode=EM_PET_211116Gosar_OPPO_TS_A_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDE1OTYyNy0yMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPQaZ0mSMUHIt_xDDR2440x1CHjiMBQhEM-CqSZkEF8=&emci=da737cae-e446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a4159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14943358)_**
[Sign your name now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38694360/316629699/263202716?refcode=EM_PET_211116Gosar_OPPO_TS_A_4_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDE1OTYyNy0yMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPQaZ0mSMUHIt_xDDR2440x1CHjiMBQhEM-CqSZkEF8=&emci=da737cae-e446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a4159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14943358)
**We are at huge risk of the Republicans taking back the House. We saw what happened in Virginia. We cannot let someone like Gosar define us as Americans and as a country.** We have to stand up to people like him, hold Ann Wagner accountable, and demand she denounce him.
**_[We need people to make their voices heard. Add your name and be one of 100 people to demand that Ann Wagner denounce Paul Gosar for his vile tweet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38694362/316629702/263202716?refcode=EM_PET_211116Gosar_OPPO_TS_A_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDE1OTYyNy0yMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPQaZ0mSMUHIt_xDDR2440x1CHjiMBQhEM-CqSZkEF8=&emci=da737cae-e446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a4159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14943358)_**

body:
It's been over a year since we defeated Donald Trump at the ballot box, but it's clear we still have a lot of work to do to combat the hate he spread during his time in office. Last year, the FBI reported that hate crimes are at the highest level they've been in two decades. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38694403/316629891/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MTU5NjI3LTIwNDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i1pxp0Qt70lPL3uzy7UmBeWZ9qcCuZQK9wNVX9JYb2s=&emci=066e8220-0647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Team,

It's been over a year since we defeated Donald Trump at the ballot box, but it's clear we still have a lot of work to do to combat the hate he spread during his time in office. Last year, the FBI reported that hate crimes are at the highest level they've been in two decades.

* **[Donate to the Southern Poverty Law Center](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38694404/316629892/270596628?2022.donation=form1&df_id=2022&mfc_pref=T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MTU5NjI3LTIwNDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i1pxp0Qt70lPL3uzy7UmBeWZ9qcCuZQK9wNVX9JYb2s=&emci=066e8220-0647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001)** who is fighting for racial justice and working to dismantle white supremacy.
* **[Take action with ADL](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38694405/316629893/-1010526370?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MTU5NjI3LTIwNDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i1pxp0Qt70lPL3uzy7UmBeWZ9qcCuZQK9wNVX9JYb2s=&emci=066e8220-0647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001)** a group dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism and hate.
* **[Donate to Stop AAPI Hate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38694418/316629894/-53080252?cid=14711&n=922959&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MTU5NjI3LTIwNDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i1pxp0Qt70lPL3uzy7UmBeWZ9qcCuZQK9wNVX9JYb2s=&emci=066e8220-0647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001)** to help the group track and respond to the surge in anti-Asian racism and xenophobia.
* **[Find your local ACLU chapter and take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38694419/316630017/639280697?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1MTU5NjI3LTIwNDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i1pxp0Qt70lPL3uzy7UmBeWZ9qcCuZQK9wNVX9JYb2s=&emci=066e8220-0647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95159627-2047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001)** to help protect our civil liberties.

While they focus on this important work, we're working to defeat the radical Republicans in Congress who are helping to contribute to the rise of extremism we're seeing across the country.

Hi everyone, I'll keep this brief, but this is important.

I wanted to take a quick second to update you on our 48-hour mid-month goal.

Mid-months are critical for our campaign because they give us a pretty good idea of where our fundraising goals are heading for the rest of the month. Missing this month's goal is a big warning sign and I have to spend days re-tuning what we thought we could do.

clean_body: I'm nervous, but excited. | = Hi everyone, I'll keep this brief, but this is important. I wanted to take a quick second to update you on our 48-hour mid-month goal. Mid-months are critical for our campaign because they give us a pretty good idea of where our fundraising goals are heading for the rest of the month. Missing this month's goal is a big warning sign and I have to spend days re-tuning what we thought we could do. Right now, we’re $801 short of where we want to be. It’s not an impossible number to reach, but with less than 24 hours left, we need our team to step up and close the gap. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Noah Kutner Finance Director | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. Friend,

As our next governor, Charlie Crist has promised to:
* **_Legalize_** adult-use marijuana and allow up to six plants to be grown for personal use.
* Use the proceeds from marijuana legalization to **_fund_** drug treatment and diversion programs.
* **_Expunge_** criminal records for marijuana-related misdemeanors and third-degree felonies.

_After all, we brew our own beer in Florida. Why shouldn’t we be allowed to grow our own weed?_

name: Alex Mooney
subject: Endorsed by Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Mooney for Congress
body:
When I took office, I made a promise to fight for America FIRST just like President Trump always did. Now, I'm excited to share that President Trump endorsed my campaign... | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
---

Peter, do you miss Donald Trump?

I know I certainly do.

Especially now, while Joe Biden and his radical allies are destroying our country.

That's why I'm excited to share that President Trump endorsed my campaign:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
[ | [Show Trump you are with me with $22 Today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)

Redistricting has drawn me and David McKinley (known RINO) into the same district in 2022.

When I took office, I made a promise to fight for America FIRST just like President Trump always did.

_And I will never give up on that promise._

Do you stand with me and Donald Trump against weak sellouts like David McKinley?

[ [Yes, I'm with you and Donald Trump!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)

David McKinley has consistently let down conservative West Virginians and let down America.

* **He voted for the Nancy Pelosi's January 6th Commission witch hunt**
* **He voted to pass the $1.2 TRILLION dollar Infrastructure Bill full of leftist priorities**
* **And he voted to grant amnesty to illegal immigrants**

[**Will you rush a contribution of $22 today so I can defeat the RINO David McKinley in the 2022 primaries?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
[ [Yes, this is a critical fight](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
In Donald Trump's words: _" All Republicans who voted for Democrat longevity should be ashamed of themselves..."_

I agree with President Trump that all Republicans who voted for the Democrat longevity either need to start voting for America FIRST, or they need to be replaced by principled conservatives who won't cave to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the rest of the radical left.

[**Will you chip in $10, $22, $100 or whatever you can to stand with me and Donald Trump?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)

[ [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
[ [CONTRIBUTE $22](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
[ [CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
--- ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)

We still have 3 more years of Joe Biden's presidency, and we cannot afford to have Republicans who will cave to the radical left on critical issues.

Thank you in advance for your support.

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58788780:J6nToe2PN:m:1:3298722022:5E0A1236EF41232DCBE1131899DE97E3:r)
Alex X. Mooney, WV-2

P.S. LET'S GO BRANDON!

Martinsburg, WV 25402

name: Team Patty
subject: We can’t let the GOP take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
You won’t believe what Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) just said.
#
Peter,
We already knew that the Senate GOP are looking out for themselves instead of working families -- but the latest comments from Senator Rick Scott of Florida make it crystal clear:
_“You can see what’s going to happen next. We’re going to continue to have inflation, and then interest rates will go up,” said Sen. Rick Scott (R., Fla.), who heads the GOP’s Senate-campaign arm and has for months sought to call attention to inflation._
_**“This is a gold mine for us,” Mr. Scott said.**_
**[Senator Scott’s comments -- calling inflation a “gold mine” for Republicans -- once again show that Republicans are focused on their own political future, not your family. Will you make a $5 contribution now to stop the GOP from taking back the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695412/316633748/817498879?refcode=pm_em_211116_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTEwNjE0Yi0yMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gn7qOWsG5G1ox2VsftSM4aJRxmTmVaa4oZ32oEdW_dk=)**
Right now, Democrats are working hard to pass the Build Back Better budget and help our economy keep coming back in ways that help working families and communities, like the bipartisan, job-creating infrastructure bill President Biden signed into law this week *and* the Build Back Better budget \-- which will cut middle class families’ taxes and lower families’ costs for child care, health care, caregiving, and so much more.
Meanwhile, Senate Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud -- and cheering for higher costs for families -- because they care about one thing only: putting Mitch McConnell back in charge of the Senate.
**If the Republicans take back the Senate, we know they’ll leave working families behind.**
**[Peter, this is our chance to fight back. Pitch in $5 to keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695413/316633749/817498879?refcode=pm_em_211116_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTEwNjE0Yi0yMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gn7qOWsG5G1ox2VsftSM4aJRxmTmVaa4oZ32oEdW_dk=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695414/316633750/817498879?refcode=pm_em_211116_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTEwNjE0Yi0yMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gn7qOWsG5G1ox2VsftSM4aJRxmTmVaa4oZ32oEdW_dk=)****

We’re going to continue to have inflation, and then interest rates will go up,” said Sen. Rick Scott (R., Fla.), who heads the GOP’s Senate-campaign arm and has for months sought to call attention to inflation. “This is a gold mine for us,” Mr. Scott said. = Right now, Democrats are working hard to pass the Build Back Better budget and help our economy keep coming back in ways that help working families and communities, like the bipartisan, job-creating infrastructure bill President Biden signed into law this week and the Build Back Better budget \-- which will cut middle class families’ taxes and lower families’ costs for child care, health care, caregiving, and so much more. Meanwhile, Senate Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud -- and cheering for higher costs for families -- because they care about one thing only: putting Mitch McConnell back in charge of the Senate. If the Republicans take back the Senate, we know they’ll leave working families behind. = Thank you, Team Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

**[Friend, this is a long email about my mom. I hope you'll take a moment to read the entire message, then consider donating $3 to support my campaign to improve the lives of working mothers in Western North Carolina and across this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695630/316634879/1573898945?refcode=em-111621-full-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGIzNGQ1OC0yNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9saOEyPKvfKDH96o-Pg0VdmfpAKvrvKJzEWTetCtEXk=)**

Things were tough growing up.

My dad was an alcoholic with an abusive streak.

At the age of 12, I considered taking my own life.

But I had the two beings who kept me safe: God and my mother.

My mom is a pillar of strength, and raised me with _mountain values._ She taught us resilience, and the importance of maintaining the heart of a servant.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695633/316634882/1573898945?refcode=em-111621-full-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGIzNGQ1OC0yNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9saOEyPKvfKDH96o-Pg0VdmfpAKvrvKJzEWTetCtEXk=)
_Me, my mom, and my brother Sam._
Mom's lessons are why I became a pastor to help folks struggling to get by. She's also why I became a teacher, football coach, and school principal to mentor kids who grew up like my brother and me.

**I've seen firsthand how working families are being left behind by extremists who would rather divide us than fight for education, economic relief, and health care access.**

**[I’m running for Congress to build bridges and restore hope. But I can only do that with help from thousands of grassroots donors across the country. I'm humbly asking you to chip in $3 before midnight to flip NC-14 from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695634/316634884/1573898945?refcode=em-111621-full-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGIzNGQ1OC0yNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9saOEyPKvfKDH96o-Pg0VdmfpAKvrvKJzEWTetCtEXk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38695636/316634885/1573898945?refcode=em-111621-full-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGIzNGQ1OC0yNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9saOEyPKvfKDH96o-Pg0VdmfpAKvrvKJzEWTetCtEXk=)

I'll be honest:

I never considered myself an activist.

I never marched in rallies or made big stump speeches.

**But after George Floyd was murdered, and the painful divisions that followed, I knew I had to do something. As a father and pastor, my spirit shifted.**

Listen, we can't do what's right for North Carolina families with politicians who sow hate and division. And I refuse to sit on the sideline while working mothers like my mom pay the price of their failures.

| Peter, **Let me introduce myself -** my name is Jon, and on Monday I joined Garrett Soldano's campaign as political director.

>From the moment I met Garrett, I could tell - __**this man is the Real Deal.**__

With our freedoms, our faith and our future under assault by power-drunk politicians, Big Tech companies and the radical left, _it will take a conservative outsider like Garrett Soldano to clean house and drain the Lansing swamp._

**I look forward to traveling the state with Garrett and working with all of you to build upon this campaign's incredible foundation.**

I've set a goal for my first week on the job**-****_I am going to help raise _$15,000 by this Friday__**** __** to grow this movement heading into 2022.
[**> > Donate Now <<**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1feb557b93&e=fe4b890356)
The leftists bankrolling Whitmer's re-election bid aren't holding back, and when this fundraising period ends on December 31st, **I want to tell Garrett that we did all we could to put an end to her tyrannical rule.**

[Can you help me reach my First Week goal and deliver another strong fundraising period?](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2c3becc929&e=fe4b890356)

name: Team Holly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzexzyIKHT6Us8ARA_tl5Sm4vCDgO-DEqg01PhnY_jc=/ofLwrbeej0vsUCTsYIHCZyF-PWoQ_GymwsRs-cJPLOU=?refcode=E12448-20211116-Redistricting3-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, If you would have asked me a month ago, I never would have expected this headline from the Fresno Bee: **" Devin Nunes, Josh Harder could lose their seats in latest California redistricting maps"** And in response, Devin Nunes leaked that he's going to run against me here in California's 10th district if these new maps stick. I'll admit, it's been a lot to take in over the past 48 hours. Especially knowing Devin Nunes has $12 million ready to spend against us. The battle for the direction of our country will be right here in this district. [**Can you please rush in the biggest donation you can right now for a showdown against Devin Nunes?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzexzyIKHT6Us8ARA_tl5Sm4vCDgO-DEqg01PhnY_jc=/ofLwrbeej0vsUCTsYIHCZyF-PWoQ_GymwsRs-cJPLOU=?refcode=E12448-20211116-Redistricting3-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzexzyIKHT6Us8ARA_tl5Sm4vCDgO-DEqg01PhnY_jc=/ofLwrbeej0vsUCTsYIHCZyF-PWoQ_GymwsRs-cJPLOU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12448-20211116-Redistricting3-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

---
Nunes is as extreme as they come. He's Trump's #1 spokesperson on Fox News, even saying Republicans' top priority must be protecting Trump and all he stands for. I shudder to think about what Nunes representing my community would mean for our families.
We may not be able to influence where Devin Nunes decides to run, but we sure as heck can get ready for the battle ahead of us.
Last month, our goal was to raise $15,000 to prepare for redistricting - that clearly isn't going to cut it anymore. [**So will you please make a generous donation right now to help us keep this seat blue no matter what ultimately happens with these district lines?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzexzyIKHT6Us8ARA_tl5Sm4vCDgO-DEqg01PhnY_jc=/ofLwrbeej0vsUCTsYIHCZyF-PWoQ_GymwsRs-cJPLOU=?refcode=E12448-20211116-Redistricting3-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
Keep the faith,
Josh

clean_body: | | Peter, If you would have asked me a month ago, I never would have expected this headline from the Fresno Bee: " Devin Nunes, Josh Harder could lose their seats in latest California redistricting maps" And in response, Devin Nunes leaked that he's going to run against me here in California's 10th district if these new maps stick. I'll admit, it's been a lot to take in over the past 48 hours. Especially knowing Devin Nunes has $12 million ready to spend against us. The battle for the direction of our country will be right here in this district. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Nunes is as extreme as they come. He's Trump's #1 spokesperson on Fox News, even saying Republicans' top priority must be protecting Trump and all he stands for. I shudder to think about what Nunes representing my community would mean for our families. We may not be able to influence where Devin Nunes decides to run, but we sure as heck can get ready for the battle ahead of us. Last month, our goal was to raise $15,000 to prepare for redistricting - that clearly isn't going to cut it anymore. Keep the faith, Josh = =

subject: “Punting” on SCOTUS expansion?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | The 5th Circuit Court of Appeals has ruled that the draconian Texas abortion ban can be enforced while the law is under review, as the case awaits a ruling from the Supreme Court.
Meanwhile, CNN reported that a White House commission on the Supreme Court is "punting" on whether to balance the court by adding more justices.
**If we don’t take action now, things will only get worse. We cannot rely on a stolen right-wing majority on the Supreme Court to protect our rights.**
******[Stand with Melanie and sign on: to protect our Constitutional rights, we need to expand the Supreme Court.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfZ9kVEUhnR48CyewtxZ6A7W217IsLCG3mkgdo1NbGfT0pHdEuX_ue5ejltWK6bRtKF4AhOTu000JonzWQYlEnM_3vrsPjMC6saqc9wBczp7zfxaNr2CGjGT05Al-CUGLhwkQV-NB7kITXM3FEST9qszMRNDAo3hrVCozFT53nSETZfmEOkQTdiHfRVQIWiRcuzWDFr_rZ0E3C4wi5nfW2tBpA9zqoJgoIdlc-mFS8PqoPcXeYEl9tlEbk4NAYipQEJtOdc2SXjWKbdKMYO2euu3IPByD8i8NzCcE9BBjhtSecIrvUv6adiqxJKPvBZbWbf_16TrYiSM6S3BtkB8leJRSWjCSX6EtlVktngWdXB6r5Zz4ZWx7iUpRWp-x2HfTCUE-D25zzAk2uj9_5l8aXxj2-kHh30oPWKzq2L0Jc0HSbO7Ol2QXkdJjP8VLhFB_WrSyQ66SO2itB-iw7kBj69jvnn9dHpEGM_h5ik-R0w6jFVCnoq0MFJf4s3IqZADYhX5Xi86RLH2oSvyoXjPsg2dFMtJ5YH-cdbYoABNQgXq0/3h2/XP-UFIMLSuqXE1pbWfeosQ/h0/XZn-eN6rYTjQIW_7Gz8rSSKiNgnjm2Cmi6UDy_essq4)**
Texas’s Senate Bill 8 allows anyone to sue people seeking abortion care, doctors, and even rideshare drivers that transport them for at least $10,000 in damages. Similar bills have already been introduced in multiple states.
We cannot rely on rigged, conservative courts to protect our reproductive rights.
We need a pro-choice majority in Congress to expand the Supreme Court and codify Roe into law.
**[Stand with Melanie and sign on: expand SCOTUS now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfZ9kVEUhnR48CyewtxZ6A7W217IsLCG3mkgdo1NbGfT0pHdEuX_ue5ejltWK6bRtKF4AhOTu000JonzWQYlEnM_3vrsPjMC6saqc9wBczp7zfxaNr2CGjGT05Al-CUGLhwkQV-NB7kITXM3FEST9qszMRNDAo3hrVCozFT53nSETZfmEOkQTdiHfRVQIWiRcuzWDFr_rZ0E3C4wi5nfW2tBpA9zqoJgoIdlc-mFS8PqoPcXeYEl9tlEbk4NAYipQEJtOdc2SXjWKbdKMYO2euu3IPByD8i8NzCcE9BBjhtSecIrvUv6adiqxJKPvBZbWbf_16TrYiSM6S3BtkB8leJbFqqdU92uZVI8hXjhD0XvzijcKQsl7rR7asSsXiqrDMcPj87DTliLexDf-gOFdjcwQsdAXgCKAfkeTF-KSp6o8PMYDgZcViZOdoIpr6Jlps9BJNcPPF-gy5siPGXOVztAybulDUvpPSj5FE8Cz3MtafdLT2TxFQdfYyfCfTNE3hqn-3jPjm7LlBhYflrnyJNgMiPtTQrF5zoaOQhC8jIpU/3h2/XP-UFIMLSuqXE1pbWfeosQ/h1/EIulkhHdid7ElIFRUs_UWMDZ4psi4B1jd8L3YdeF578)**

clean_body: | | | The 5th Circuit Court of Appeals has ruled that the draconian Texas abortion ban can be enforced while the law is under review, as the case awaits a ruling from the Supreme Court. Meanwhile, CNN reported that a White House commission on the Supreme Court is "punting" on whether to balance the court by adding more justices. If we don’t take action now, things will only get worse. We cannot rely on a stolen right-wing majority on the Supreme Court to protect our rights. **** Texas’s Senate Bill 8 allows anyone to sue people seeking abortion care, doctors, and even rideshare drivers that transport them for at least $10,000 in damages. Similar bills have already been introduced in multiple states. We cannot rely on rigged, conservative courts to protect our reproductive rights. We need a pro-choice majority in Congress to expand the Supreme Court and codify Roe into law. Thanks for standing up. \-- Team D’Arrigo | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Biden loves illegals with all his heart & mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Amnesty in his reconciliation bill |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fb78174a2c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I thought it was bad enough that Biden wanted to give illegals $450,000 each!

But now his reconciliation bill gives them amnesty, all illegally.

_It is now clear: Biden loves illegals, with all his heart. He wants this invasion!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dc5a513be0&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This district was targeted by the NRCC- it's ripe for the taking!**

Joe Biden is sponsoring an invasion of America, consisting of millions of illegal immigrants.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b6d357b0a5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports on Biden's plans to invite an invasion of illegal immigrants:

_A provision in Democrats' Build Back Better social spending plan would grant parole to immigrants who entered the U.S. illegally more than 10 years ago to shield them from being deported.

The $1.75 trillion spending package introduced in the House on Thursday, which is expected to go to a vote Friday, includes a provision — Section 60001 — allowing the Secretary of Homeland Security (DHS) to grant five-year parole to certain immigrants who file for parole and pay an undisclosed administrative fee, as well as a background check "to the satisfaction of the Secretary of Homeland Security," until Sept. 30, 2031.

Parole would allow some 6.8 million immigrants who entered the United States before Jan. 1, 2011 — and have continued to live in the country since — to obtain travel and work permits, plus drivers' licenses or state identification cards.

DHS is currently required to grant parole to qualifying individuals entering the country, but this new provision would allow the secretary to offer parole to those who have already been living within U.S. borders for a decade or longer.

The provision also prohibits the DHS secretary from revoking an individual's parole unless the secretary "determines that the individual is ineligible for parole, based on the policies and implementing guidance that were in effect when the individual was initially granted parole."_

$450,000 per illegal entering the country.

7 million illegals getting amnesty by Biden.

_**Joe Biden is committing treason. He has invited an invading army of foreign nationals into our country to destroy it from within.**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c6829dd66b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden knows he can't win re-election with votes from Americans. So he's importing new voters.

And my Dem incumbent, Darren Soto, is cheering him along, rooting for amnesty!

This must be stopped. A country without borders is no country at all.**

[I will force Biden to close our border. We will repeal this odious reconciliation bill, as well as the "infrastructure" act. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dd3bd77cff&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. He wants open borders just like Biden!_

Right now, we need to defend our country against this traitor! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=052bea8eb1&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ce14e6cbe3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=911f937ccc&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8ee64b2704&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=672128c720&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |
