name: Mark Kelly
subject: Sign my petition saying you support legislation that would take on pharmaceutical companies and lower the cost of prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When I first ran for the Senate, I promised to fight to lower prescription drug prices for Arizona families.
#

Friends —
When I first ran for the Senate, I promised to fight to lower prescription drug prices for Arizona families.
For far too long, we’ve been at the mercy of big pharmaceutical companies that put profits before patients. The United States pays far more for the same drugs than other countries.
As a result, nearly one in four seniors will struggle to afford their prescription drugs — drugs they desperately need.
I take my promises to Arizona seriously, and I’ve been working hard to deliver on this. A few weeks ago, I struck a deal that would take on these pharmaceutical companies and lower drug prices for seniors. But it’s not across the finish line yet.
This is an idea supported by an overwhelming number of Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. It’ll help countless Arizonans. It’s the right thing to do. And we have a chance to get it done.
But it won’t happen unless we make our voices heard.
So I’m asking:
[**Sign my petition saying you support legislation that would lower the cost of prescription drugs by letting Medicare negotiate those prices on behalf of patients.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/drug_prices_petition?source=em211116-1-15&t=1&akid=1676%2E6688874%2E0yBDtW)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/drug_prices_petition?source=em211116-1-15&t=2&akid=1676%2E6688874%2E0yBDtW)**
For Arizonans struggling with the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs, this reform can’t come soon enough.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1676%2E6688874%2E0yBDtW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

A few weeks ago, I struck a deal that would take on these pharmaceutical companies and lower drug prices for seniors. But it’s not across the finish line yet. This is an idea supported by an overwhelming number of Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. It’ll help countless Arizonans. It’s the right thing to do. And we have a chance to get it done. But it won’t happen unless we make our voices heard. So I’m asking: For Arizonans struggling with the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs, this reform can’t come soon enough. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:
What if we told you that if Cheri wins this seat, we probably won’t have to worry about Mitch McConnell becoming majority leader again?
#

Friends -
Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today?
What if we told you Donald Trump just held a fundraiser for one of Cheri Beasley’s opponents and will be VERY involved in trying to beat us?
What if we told you that Cheri will make you proud in the Senate with her votes, her tireless advocacy for North Carolina and her trailblazing courage as the third African-American woman ever elected to the chamber?

clean_body: What if we told you that if Cheri wins this seat, we probably won’t have to worry about Mitch McConnell becoming majority leader again? Friends - Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today? What if we told you Donald Trump just held a fundraiser for one of Cheri Beasley’s opponents and will be VERY involved in trying to beat us? What if we told you that Cheri will make you proud in the Senate with her votes, her tireless advocacy for North Carolina and her trailblazing courage as the third African-American woman ever elected to the chamber? And what if we told you Cheri’s halfway to the FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight and we are short of our fundraising goals? The timing is not great, but if lots of people chip in, we’ll get there: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you again. For everything. This donation means A LOT. Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zuMjeKS5TDscN4E-R7LZo2kUprNVz-MDvXejWbbPYC4GpXTwQ8Z-6wyeMH0RDYfFFCJChj10pwbjQYT090vTWshb7EmDsSqstNBSzngQUoWe6oa5fkiJindYSUa5kL_nm/3h2/Ns8SlF7QT3emMmtE9dPqjw/h0/ilEUbWCjoaDMtVjuJdHLtHEsiOVigokf4oKyYwlRIwk)
---
Hello,
I’m writing today to say thank you.
Yesterday, we had our first mid-month deadline of the campaign, and with the help of grassroots donors like you, I’m happy to report that we hit our important fundraising goal. Thank you. You made it happen.
I am so grateful to have people like you on the team. When I announced a run for the Senate against Chuck Grassley last month, I knew what we’d be up against. Grassley has a $3 million campaign war chest of cash he’s taken from special interests, and Mitch McConnell is already raising millions into Super PACs getting ready to attack me.
Who knows, maybe Donald Trump’s PACs will have some leftover money after attempting to defend Trump against his various lawsuits to come after me, as well.
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Democrats’ majority in the Senate is razor-thin. If we’re going to combat the climate crisis, protect our democracy and voting rights, take on Wall Street, and expand health care access to everyone, we need to elect more bold Democrats. My Senate race here in Iowa could determine it all.
I’m so thankful to you for helping me defeat Chuck Grassley next year.
Thanks again,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Patrick Denny, Wes Moore for  Maryland
subject: Updates from the campaign trail!
body:
Check out the latest below!

| | Friend - Thank you for your continued support of Wes Moore! Please see below the latest updates from the campaign for our top supporters. It's been a busy start to November for Wes: we are officially on the airwaves running our first set of radio ads of the campaign, last week on Veterans Day we launched "Veterans for Wes", today Wes announced the endorsement of Montgomery County Senator Cheryl Kagan, and tonight Wes will be participating in a gubernatorial forum on stage with the other candidates (see the link below to watch live!). We have several more opportunities to see Wes at either upcoming fundraising events or through volunteer opportunities between now and Thanksgiving, and after the holiday - all of which are included below. We are so grateful for your continued support, and look forward to seeing you again soon! Many thanks, and more updates to follow! clean_body: Check out the latest below! | | Friend - Thank you for your continued support of Wes Moore! Please see below the latest updates from the campaign for our top supporters. It's been a busy start to November for Wes: we are officially on the airwaves running our first set of radio ads of the campaign, last week on Veterans Day we launched "Veterans for Wes", today Wes announced the endorsement of Montgomery County Senator Cheryl Kagan, and tonight Wes will be participating in a gubernatorial forum on stage with the other candidates (see the link below to watch live!). We have several more opportunities to see Wes at either upcoming fundraising events or through volunteer opportunities between now and Thanksgiving, and after the holiday - all of which are included below. We are so grateful for your continued support, and look forward to seeing you again soon! Many thanks, and more updates to follow! Patrick Denny Finance Director Wes Moore for Maryland TONIGHT: Baltimore Town Hall Forum: Tonight Wes Moore is participating in the Saint Ignatius Baltimore "Meet your Candidates" Forum at 6pm! LISTEN: Our first radio ad is up in Prince George's County! Join one of our affinity groups! What people are saying - highlights from the press: “We’ve got to make sure everything from grant capital that’s coming to our small businesses to how we’re adjusting to procurement reform [happens],” author and former nonprofit executive Wes Moore said Monday. “All these elements need to be in place if we’re going to create true economic pathways for our small and micro-businesses and other businesses within Prince George’s County.” Author and former nonprofit chief executive Wes Moore is running radio ads on five urban-format and gospel stations in the Washington area, targeting voter-rich Prince George’s and Montgomery counties. They will run through Thanksgiving. - In the ad, Moore goes over his plans for economic development and some high points of his biography, including losing his father as a young boy, being named a Rhodes Scholar, serving in the Army and running a national nonprofit organization. Retweet and Share! Save the date: Upcoming Fundraisers! See the below details for some of our upcoming fundraisers - we hope you can join us! | Peter -
Our American values are under constant attack from the Swamp Socialists in Washington, DC. That's why it's critical for patriots like you to get in the fight and elect true conservatives to Congress who will defend our Constitution. And there are not many who we can count on to be better fighters in Congress than my friend and fellow Navy veteran Tom Weiler. That's why I'm working hard to send Tom to Congress as the Representative for Minnesota's 3rd District. Tom is the real deal - a true patriot who's dedicated his life to fighting for our country.
And he's running against one of Nancy Pelosi's top allies - Liberal Democrat Dean Phillips - who has voted in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. If we are going to take back the House, we need to vote liberals like Dean Phillips out. Phillips has put his political party and the socialist agenda over the interests of his constituents and our country, and it's time to hold him accountable.

| Tom served our country honorably for 20 years as a Navy Submarine Officer, deploying on multiple submarines and one aircraft carrier across the globe. During that time, he led hundreds of critical and dangerous missions that were vital to America's national security.
Tom and I have something else in common. Much like me, he was thrown a curveball at the peak of his Navy career. Just as he was on track to become a Submarine Commanding Officer, he was diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease. He continued to serve, and with the endorsement of his Shipmates and doctors, Tom requested a medical waiver to return to ship. His request was denied.
I know the pain of not being able to serve side by side with my brothers in the field. But as Tom's time in the Navy came to an end, he found his next mission: serving his fellow Minnesotans in the United States Congress.

Peter,

Yesterday, President Biden signed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that will benefit every single person in this country. It’ll provide $110B for fixing roads, $73B for the electrical grid, $66B for railroads, $65B for broadband, $55B for water infrastructure, $47B for coastal adjustments, but there’s still more work to do to unlock this bill’s full potential.

The Build Back Better reconciliation package is waiting in Congress to be passed next -- and it has monumental investments in it that include things like child care, climate action, affordable housing, job training, and lowering health care and prescription drug costs.

Right now, some congressional members are stalling this bill, and we need to show that Democrats support President Biden’s Build Back Better plan.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Aurora, Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In 2012, a mass shooter opened fire in a movie theater there, killing 12 people and injuring 70 more.
#

Friends —
Six teenagers were wounded yesterday in a shooting in a park near their high school in Aurora, Colorado.
These are six students with families who had to get the call from police that their child was a victim of gun violence. Six families who had to worry about the outcome of their child’s gunshot injuries as they were being tended to in a hospital.
The city of Aurora, Colorado has already experienced the heartbreak and trauma of a mass shooting. In 2012, a mass shooter opened fire in a movie theater there, killing 12 people and injuring 70 more. This is far too much to ask one community to shoulder.
But with your help, we can stop these tragedies from happening. That’s why we have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution today to help us pass gun safety legislation and save lives? Your contribution will be put immediately to work to help us push gun safety legislation through Congress. Please pitch in if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211116-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1209_3935704_DSZBKV&akid=1209%2E3935704%2EDSZBKV)
Children are being traumatized and injured by gun violence in their communities and places of learning. Schools and parks are places where families and children should feel _safe_. These are places of learning and growth.
But in 2021 alone, there have been at least 205 incidents where a gun has been fired or brandished on school grounds—resulting in 32 deaths and 141 injuries nationally.
With your help, we can make sure our children stay safe. We are going to keep guns out of the hands of the wrong people, and make sure students can focus on learning instead of fear.
Thank you for your help in this fight.
_Team Giffords_
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211116-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1209_3935704_DSZBKV&akid=1209%2E3935704%2EDSZBKV)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1209%2E3935704%2EDSZBKV) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697265/316641799/-420428835?refcode=20211116_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697266/316641800/-392698372?refcode=20211116_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697267/316641801/-420428835?refcode=20211116_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697268/316641802/-392698372?refcode=20211116_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697269/316641803/-420428835?refcode=20211116_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697270/316641804/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=&emci=c15e4ec5-f946-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7178162d-2c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697271/316641805/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=&emci=c15e4ec5-f946-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7178162d-2c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697272/316641806/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=&emci=c15e4ec5-f946-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7178162d-2c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38697273/316641807/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTc4MTYyZC0yYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihytP-4gqyvww52byCHumcB5F25FmcvnidKx2DbK_Jc=&emci=c15e4ec5-f946-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7178162d-2c47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=194769)

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Vaccine Mandate Victory
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6595%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=J2Wh6qF64vOMs29DNH0RWw&sysid=1)
| |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot:

When Joe Biden announced his unconstitutional national vaccine mandate, CPI and our partners were ready for the fight.

Just days later, we won the first round when the U.S. Court of Appeals blocked Biden’s mandate pending further litigation.

Let me tell you how it happened.

As you know, Joe Biden doesn’t have the power to force private citizens to get vaccinated for Covid. OSHA doesn’t have that authority, either. Congress never gave it to them. The so-called “mandate” is a lawless, tyrannical abuse of power.

Conservatives have seen this movie before. Biden is running the same playbook his old boss, Barack Obama, used when he issued his illegal DACA amnesty order in 2012. Only with DACA, it took _**nine years**_ for a court to declare its illegality. This time, **_it took two weeks_**.

The difference? [**CPI**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67019%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A7v%2bhvpJxd2VNZFNvxB3gw&sysid=1).

Even before Biden issued his mandate, one CPI partner organization - Russ Vought’s _Center for Renewing America_ - detailed why it was illegal, unconstitutional, and could be resisted.

At the same time, another CPI partner, Stephen Miller’s _America First Legal_ , drafted lawsuits to challenge the mandate in federal court. They are the ones who beat Biden in Court.

This is what we mean when we say _**CPI’s job is to make all conservatives better at theirs**_. The Left has always had coordination between activists, communicators, experts, and policymakers. Conservatives never did: until CPI.

Now, not only are conservative policy thinkers coordinating strategy with legal foundations, but conservative members of Congress have taken the fight to Capitol Hill, opposing all legislation funding the enforcement of OSHA’s mandate.

Meanwhile, all of our partners are using CPI’s state-of-the-art recording studios to get their message out to the country, bypassing the woke, socialist filters of the mainstream media.

**[Help CPI continue to support conservatives in the fight for America's future with a tax-deductible donation!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67010%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A0uCet1IUM%2bCe%2f%2bynnzSyg&sysid=1)**

It used to be, this was how the Left fought, and why they won. Conservatives were fractured, disorganized, and fighting for scraps of airtime from the Fake News propagandists.

CPI’s team - hardened by years of battles with the Left and fueled by the rising MAGA movement - understands that in the fight for America’s future, the best defense is a good offense.

**[Please help CPI continue to train, equip, and united conservatives with a one-time or recurring donation!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67011%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8MHgs%2bcsmh%2flVegjGl%2fk9g&sysid=1)**

CPI has not just changed the game. Thanks to the support of freedom-loving Americans like you, we’re winning it.

For Freedom,
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax
[CPI.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67012%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wRLNqSCNkIG7I2qF3WHmuQ&sysid=1)
[**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9lsne5eDyEljuWKb9zM96g&sysid=1)
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6595%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=J2Wh6qF64vOMs29DNH0RWw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6595%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=J2Wh6qF64vOMs29DNH0RWw&sysid=1)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Will you join our campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Yesterday, Amy and I kicked off our campaign for governor.

This campaign is about the future of Texas — the Texas that Amy and I want
for our three kids. A Texas where our leaders unite us rather than divide
us, and are focused on protecting working families and keeping our
communities safe.

I’m running for governor because I believe Texas deserves better than the
failed leadership and divisive politics that we see today. I know that we
can crush Covid, fix our broken power grid, and guarantee that Texas has
the safest, healthiest, and most prosperous communities in the nation —
but only if we come together to push for something greater.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211116&t=1001&akid=162878%2E444211%2EvALXIN ]If you're with me, will you add your name to join our campaign today?

Join our campaign »

In my past work as an entrepreneur and small businessman, a member of the
El Paso City Council, a U.S. Representative, and the founder of a
grassroots voting rights organization, I learned that we’re able to do the
most good and get the most done when we take the time to listen and learn
from one another.

That’s why I’m on the road right now, traveling across the state to listen
and learn from the Texans that I hope to serve as this state’s next
governor. Texans know exactly what we need — better jobs, better schools,
expanded health care access, and safer, healthier communities. They just
need someone to take action.

As
governor, that's what I promise to do: Take action on the issues most
important to Texans and work with each and every one of you to get a lot
done together.

We’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people of Texas. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211116&t=1002&akid=162878%2E444211%2EvALXIN ]So, will
you take a moment to join our campaign to represent every single Texan?

We are doing something historic together. Thank you for being a part of
it.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=162878%2E444211%2EvALXIN

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: CNN Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: NH will be competitive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**"Make no mistake: New Hampshire will be competitive next fall."** -_CNN_ Folks -- News outlets across the country, from _CNN_ to _NBC_ , are calling Maggie Hassan one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. And _CNN_ already named New Hampshire one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. Regardless of who our opponent is, this race is going to be an uphill battle, and we aren't taking anything for granted. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate and he is laser-focused on New Hampshire. Outside groups and Republican super PACs, including McConnell's, have already spent OVER $4.5 million in an attempt to unseat Maggie, and there's more on the way. In a race this competitive, we can't afford to fall behind as the GOP raises millions of dollars. Unlike Republicans, we don't rely on outside interest groups and megadonors to fund our campaign. We're powered by grassroots donors like you team. **[So please, can you rush $5 today to help us match the GOP's war chest and defend this critical Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38698393/316645884/-1803038125?refcode=e20211116_cnn&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4OTM3YS0zMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MA84yW1yMC5hHfcis57JS_61iYrGCXJB02RSRguuw4I=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38698394/316645885/-1803038125?refcode=e20211116_cnn&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4OTM3YS0zMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MA84yW1yMC5hHfcis57JS_61iYrGCXJB02RSRguuw4I=)

clean_body: | | | "Make no mistake: New Hampshire will be competitive next fall." -CNN Folks -- News outlets across the country, from CNN to NBC , are calling Maggie Hassan one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. And CNN already named New Hampshire one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. Regardless of who our opponent is, this race is going to be an uphill battle, and we aren't taking anything for granted. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate and he is laser-focused on New Hampshire. Outside groups and Republican super PACs, including McConnell's, have already spent OVER $4.5 million in an attempt to unseat Maggie, and there's more on the way. In a race this competitive, we can't afford to fall behind as the GOP raises millions of dollars. Unlike Republicans, we don't rely on outside interest groups and megadonors to fund our campaign. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s SIGNED. Here’s what we do now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As I’ve said for months, it’s time to build us ALL back better.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, I joined my colleagues at the White House to witness President Biden sign our historic infrastructure bill into law. This bill will invest billions of dollars into our roads, bridges, highways, and waterways. It invests in our ports, public transportation, drinking water, and clean energy infrastructure. And it does so while creating millions of good-paying, union jobs.
**But as the President made clear, our work is NOT finished.** We are not done delivering. We are not done taking on the many interconnected crises we face. And we are not done making a real, transformational difference in the lives of working people across America.
Peter, yesterday was about investing in roads and bridges. Today is about investing in families and communities. [**If you’re with us, can you chip in $3 or more today to help us keep up the fight to pass the Build Back Better Act this week?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=808_420207_a9Claf&akid=808%2E420207%2Ea9Claf)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=808_420207_a9Claf&akid=808%2E420207%2Ea9Claf)**
As I’ve said for months, it’s time to build us ALL back better.
To do so, we can’t leave _anyone_ behind — which is why we’re ready to finally make universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, Medicare expansion, action to address climate change, affordable housing, childcare, and much more a reality.
**Now, we need to do everything possible to get it over the finish line.** We need to pass it through the House this week. We need to immediately pass it through the Senate in its current form. And we need to send it to President Biden’s desk so it can also be signed into law.
With all of you standing up, speaking out, and organizing for change — we will make it happen. [**Chip in $3 or more to help us finally pass the Build Back Better Act this week and deliver transformative investments in working people at a historic scale.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=808_420207_a9Claf&akid=808%2E420207%2Ea9Claf)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-808&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=808_420207_a9Claf&akid=808%2E420207%2Ea9Claf)**
Thank you for joining me in calling on Congress to move forward, to get this done, and to deliver for people across America.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211116-808-footer&t=23&refcode2=808_420207_a9Claf&akid=808%2E420207%2Ea9Claf)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Friend --

My finance team just took a look at our fundraising numbers, and we still have a ways to go to reach our mid-month goal before midnight.

But listen, I'm not worried. Since day one of this campaign, I've been overwhelmed with the outpouring of support from Angelenos, Californians, and even folks from outside the state who are ready to build a city that puts the people first. I know tonight's deadline isn't anything we can't handle, so I'm turning to you now.

**[We checked the numbers, and we have $2,006 to go to reach our mid-month goal. Will you chip in $3, $10, or whatever you can to help us close the gap?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0uoMU3Xt3jJod3clMamDptrKt-SsxsUQl5Np_vnpwYs=/FmWOejtYIMYdpekPq-4jnZFVnYN9eXF_WJBBcj7FPHk=?ms=em21_211116_mm3_fndd_gq_geoost___KB_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211116_mm3_fndd_gq_geoost___KB_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211116_mm3_fndd_gq_geoost___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211116_mm3_fndd_gq_geoost___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

I know our team has been sending you a lot of emails over the past few days, but we wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't important. We're less than eight months out from the Primary Election. Tonight's deadline is one of the last of the year, and what we raise now can set us up for success, or send us down the wrong path.

clean_body: Friend -- My finance team just took a look at our fundraising numbers, and we still have a ways to go to reach our mid-month goal before midnight. But listen, I'm not worried. Since day one of this campaign, I've been overwhelmed with the outpouring of support from Angelenos, Californians, and even folks from outside the state who are ready to build a city that puts the people first. I know tonight's deadline isn't anything we can't handle, so I'm turning to you now. I know our team has been sending you a lot of emails over the past few days, but we wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't important. We're less than eight months out from the Primary Election. Tonight's deadline is one of the last of the year, and what we raise now can set us up for success, or send us down the wrong path. Thank you, Karen Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. name: Mark Meuser
subject: LAWSUIT UPDATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
We do not expect the consolidated court to even hear evidence on this OSHA mandate until January or February next year. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d7500095854c4613b7087b859219a79f&_e=pcjR5neL_qdybynm13eHuIw--rrY_MDnY5LEvQnysbf9lEPSEd4nQMd9gTknwhJdgLpQYfkP6LrfY742A7im1aHYDlnT5UFj65GGjlBJDORSYsDyyuDl2NxVgpABVUeDIZu6yfGeWDtbHt5NwbNr4_e1qm9RKsGrYnC7r18bM5WdMDLToJXkv2gq-yRTccVb2DyEAUH-m9qvit2P9FvMy1tjmeBjpLUMY68ljAiefcsgbyEcJkMvIiBkmiNkJQuFFxI1uTcPku_HjVOX2GZx4QncXqtXxPs6z3WWtjavaHMqpVxGCepIHwxcFve5LGkpLKOYi5uN_tWlR72dBZfvpQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I am following up on my email from last week because I wanted to ensure that you knew all the details about the 5th Circuit's order protecting your constitutional rights. The 5th Circuit boldly and clearly told Biden that he has no authority to mandate American employers become the vaccine police if they have 100+ employees.

**The 5th Circuit entered not one but two injunctions stopping the enforcement of the vaccine mandate.** The first temporary injunction was issued on November 6th because the Court thought the OSHA mandate was most likely unconstitutional. It asked Biden to attempt to explain why the OSHA mandate was not unconstitutional. Last Friday, after receiving arguments from Biden, the Court entered a preliminary injunction.

As you may remember, my firm filed a similar lawsuit in the 6th Circuit to stop Biden's vaccine mandate. Last week, my firm decided to write an amicus brief _(friend of the Court)_ to the 5th Circuit on behalf of our client to educate the 5th Circuit on the additional arguments we raised in the 6th Circuit that would help the 5th Circuit in making its decision.

Our amicus brief argued that Congress never gave OSHA the authority to regulate infectious diseases in American workers. They only had the authority to regulate workplace hazards. We continued by showing the 5th Circuit that Congress and OSHA do not have the power to require vaccine mandates because this power under the Constitution is considered a police power.

That power is reserved for the states. Finally, we argued that the vaccine mandate was unconstitutional because of the arbitrary nature of 100 employees. **_Why is it safe for 99 employees to work in a small office space but not safe for 100 employees who work as delivery drivers?_**

When the 5th Circuit entered its preliminary injunction on Friday night, it agreed with all the arguments that we had made. **This is a major victory for the American people and the Constitution.**

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d7500095854c4613b7087b859219a79f&_e=pcjR5neL_qdybynm13eHuIw--rrY_MDnY5LEvQnysbf9lEPSEd4nQMd9gTknwhJdgLpQYfkP6LrfY742A7im1aHYDlnT5UFj65GGjlBJDORSYsDyyuDl2NxVgpABVUeD-Ot7_O2fW4T4VkhFMJJGFEEbVx98FD-6yb-N2ShNg9A029PUeYiZmzD1hkmtyUvobWVr76psMw_cwl0bBMso-P78HZkoNE4W_N2Q1dnpeUzouDIY2mUOj1jL8zn--Lq2Ev-bDAkD6hDerFF37uSp4HNsF05o_oWV3sG7e_Dgj97L6WyTlGcrC-Aqz6Ik2g7gOXdbyaxzJH-B72ooRY1gcg%3D%3D)
**_So what is next?_** When businesses challenge a regulation propounded by OSHA, the Court takes all the cases that are filed within the first ten days and randomly draws one of them and makes it the lead case. All the other cases will be joined to that one case, and that Court will hold one consolidated hearing. This consolidated Court will hear expert testimony and make a final decision on whether the preliminary injunction will be made permanent.

We do not expect the consolidated Court to hear evidence on this OSHA mandate until January or February next year. In the meantime, Biden will not be allowed to require businesses to become the vaccine police.

It does not matter if you are pro-vaccine or anti-vaccine. All Americans should be appalled at the blatant violation of our fundamental freedoms of Biden and this vaccine mandate. **The Biden administration knew that this vaccine mandate was unconstitutional. Still, they pushed their socialist agenda anyways because it is clear that they want to destroy your constitutional rights.**

I cannot stand by and watch the trampling of our constitutional rights because Biden thinks he is above the law. This is why I've stood up and volunteered to represent you in the U.S. Senate. We need to take my fight for your constitutional rights from the courthouse to the U.S. Capitol.

clean_body: We do not expect the consolidated court to even hear evidence on this OSHA mandate until January or February next year. | Peter, I am following up on my email from last week because I wanted to ensure that you knew all the details about the 5th Circuit's order protecting your constitutional rights. The 5th Circuit boldly and clearly told Biden that he has no authority to mandate American employers become the vaccine police if they have 100+ employees. The 5th Circuit entered not one but two injunctions stopping the enforcement of the vaccine mandate. The first temporary injunction was issued on November 6th because the Court thought the OSHA mandate was most likely unconstitutional. It asked Biden to attempt to explain why the OSHA mandate was not unconstitutional. Last Friday, after receiving arguments from Biden, the Court entered a preliminary injunction. As you may remember, my firm filed a similar lawsuit in the 6th Circuit to stop Biden's vaccine mandate. Last week, my firm decided to write an amicus brief (friend of the Court) to the 5th Circuit on behalf of our client to educate the 5th Circuit on the additional arguments we raised in the 6th Circuit that would help the 5th Circuit in making its decision. Our amicus brief argued that Congress never gave OSHA the authority to regulate infectious diseases in American workers. They only had the authority to regulate workplace hazards. We continued by showing the 5th Circuit that Congress and OSHA do not have the power to require vaccine mandates because this power under the Constitution is considered a police power. That power is reserved for the states. Finally, we argued that the vaccine mandate was unconstitutional because of the arbitrary nature of 100 employees. Why is it safe for 99 employees to work in a small office space but not safe for 100 employees who work as delivery drivers? When the 5th Circuit entered its preliminary injunction on Friday night, it agreed with all the arguments that we had made. This is a major victory for the American people and the Constitution. So what is next? When businesses challenge a regulation propounded by OSHA, the Court takes all the cases that are filed within the first ten days and randomly draws one of them and makes it the lead case. All the other cases will be joined to that one case, and that Court will hold one consolidated hearing. This consolidated Court will hear expert testimony and make a final decision on whether the preliminary injunction will be made permanent. We do not expect the consolidated Court to hear evidence on this OSHA mandate until January or February next year. In the meantime, Biden will not be allowed to require businesses to become the vaccine police. It does not matter if you are pro-vaccine or anti-vaccine. All Americans should be appalled at the blatant violation of our fundamental freedoms of Biden and this vaccine mandate. The Biden administration knew that this vaccine mandate was unconstitutional. Still, they pushed their socialist agenda anyways because it is clear that they want to destroy your constitutional rights. I cannot stand by and watch the trampling of our constitutional rights because Biden thinks he is above the law. This is why I've stood up and volunteered to represent you in the U.S. Senate. We need to take my fight for your constitutional rights from the courthouse to the U.S. Capitol. Can you take a moment to make a $5 or $10 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? Here is a secure link to donate: Thank you Peter, Mark Meuser Republican for U.S. Senate, California | | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but._

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcalsthdjc2si1s3p9uk220d4557k9br89ubt7qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg62pb4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1mcuqbeodje1rbaclimar34or4egorecbn6eo62d3nccomas9nm9i3cttnchoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephgmspm4o3i65j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgbamqbjj2rioo8kvb1j919effcpr3skbteie9fo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg62pb4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4dq1bv32mpggsh6fafurapq1v91l53gnn80r7v8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg62pb4cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4ef4f1kfc9bmlkgunan9vdibf9d2kh8vujjj9o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg62pb4cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Team Padilla
subject: One quick question to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s nothing we can’t make up for, but it’s important that we don’t fall too far behind.
#

Friends — we have just one quick question to ask:
[**Before the end of the week, will you make a $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign? We’ll put your donation to work immediately in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Alex Padilla in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211116-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=453_159979_mV6yT1&akid=453%2E159979%2EmV6yT1)

Your support couldn’t come at a more important time. We’re more than 50% through November, and right now our fundraising is pacing behind where we’d hoped to be at this point in the month.

clean_body: We’re so proud to have EMILY’s List on our team! | | We’re SO excited to share this news with you, Peter! Dr. Caraveo was just endorsed by EMILY’s List! = = EMILY’s List is committed to electing pro-choice women to public office. EMILY’s List knows that representation matters. They endorsed Dr. Caraveo because the communities of Colorado’s 8th district deserve to see themselves represented in Congress. As a Latina, a first generation American, and the first person in her family to go to college — Dr. Caraveo understands exactly what her community faces every single day. Little girls across Colorado deserve a representative that they can look up to. With Dr. Caraveo as a role model, they will know that they can be a construction worker, a pediatrician, a state legislator, a Congresswoman, or anything they want to be when they grow up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thanks! Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6597%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aHEXGH%2fUXctPd9kQ%2f0jLrg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HXU3cGclsWs9tkjbaNRb1A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v9zeiVpSCd3b%2bpEUjMd%2f%2bA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67027%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sEuyjkmz5ssybcD1IJRTzg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6597%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aHEXGH%2fUXctPd9kQ%2f0jLrg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6597%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aHEXGH%2fUXctPd9kQ%2f0jLrg&sysid=1)

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: The candidate who the media refuses to talk about
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glDA4ud29MTH8UqDXPW4_6qWaQ2C7GU4e6uL4cpJSFpZoTD1yvpmyTzaSgp6FCD8E9R-BeQdRPNXYY1d_6wWV1owcGGJRhkyy4Oj_twuCEvKrKluSB8NL4mTnLZkV-UT9IIoT5B_7txg79QpdH3QRUjl2XsiGKhESwXCchM0Z4haYS_7dos903zC11Vo7pKM&c=TURH44VGoxAZEa7GM4vCKXbdkB1dHxRDZUCtR7Nvob2qrxNR33gtsw==&ch=3XNL_h2i8pFteQ_DOfB4xCU8kP3PJj1HjxPoqeiNQhaY8wLdOYntSg==)

| Peter,
---
| The liberal media refuses to cover my campaign for US Senate!
They're too afraid of a black woman who doesn't blindly buy into their progressive ideology!
Both the media and the Democrat party are under the delusion that all black people are not only Democrats but radical progressives.
Well, I'm here to tell you, as a black woman, a black mother, and a black veteran, that the Democrat party does not have in mind the best interests of any Americans, regardless of race!
---
| | | [Support Kathy Barnette for Senate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glDA4ud29MTH8UqDXPW4_6qWaQ2C7GU4e6uL4cpJSFpZoTD1yvpmyTzaSgp6FCD8E9R-BeQdRPNXYY1d_6wWV1owcGGJRhkyy4Oj_twuCEvKrKluSB8NL4mTnLZkV-UT9IIoT5B_7txg79QpdH3QRUjl2XsiGKhESwXCchM0Z4haYS_7dos903zC11Vo7pKM&c=TURH44VGoxAZEa7GM4vCKXbdkB1dHxRDZUCtR7Nvob2qrxNR33gtsw==&ch=3XNL_h2i8pFteQ_DOfB4xCU8kP3PJj1HjxPoqeiNQhaY8wLdOYntSg==)
---
| If the media were to talk about me, they would have to confront that they and all other progressives are extremely patronizing to minority Americans, thinking we can't think for ourselves enough to question them.
But I can think for myself, and I don't think the progressive scheming of the Democrats is good for my country or my state. That's why I'm seeking to be the first black woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Pennsylvania - my way.
My grassroots campaign is showing how we can challenge the reflexive discrimination of our media and the conventional wisdom of Washington!
We're taking Washington by storm, and we need all the help we can get to make clear to the liberal media that we aren't going anywhere!
[Will you join us and help prove that only Pennsylvanians get to choose who our candidates and senators will be?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glDA4ud29MTH8UqDXPW4_6qWaQ2C7GU4e6uL4cpJSFpZoTD1yvpmyTzaSgp6FCD8E9R-BeQdRPNXYY1d_6wWV1owcGGJRhkyy4Oj_twuCEvKrKluSB8NL4mTnLZkV-UT9IIoT5B_7txg79QpdH3QRUjl2XsiGKhESwXCchM0Z4haYS_7dos903zC11Vo7pKM&c=TURH44VGoxAZEa7GM4vCKXbdkB1dHxRDZUCtR7Nvob2qrxNR33gtsw==&ch=3XNL_h2i8pFteQ_DOfB4xCU8kP3PJj1HjxPoqeiNQhaY8wLdOYntSg==)

body:
We had them on the ropes... |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9c27540816&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

We had them, dead to rights.

We almost killed all of Biden's putrid Anti-American agenda in one fell swoop. And then the RINOs swooped in to save him.

But this did show us something valuable: it showed us who the pro-Biden RINOs are, and [we will attack them and defeat them, with your help!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=505ef4a92b&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. Our PAC are America First grassroots patriots, supporting Trump and actively FIGHTING Biden and the RINOs who support him!

We saw that the GOP had a RINO problem earlier this year. But the RINOs had been quiet (except two), since Impeachment.

So much for that!

Now, you must remember: last week was a great week for us! We swept to power in Virginia and might have won NJ if not for some election counting shenanigans.

The Dems were on the ropes. Manchin was wavering.

[Imagine what we can do if the RINOs don't bail out Biden?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=19130b6743&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=bf8a3b241f&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Pelosi had tied the fate of the $3.7 trillion reconciliation bill- the pork barrel inflation-causing bill- to the $1.2 billion infrastructure bill.

Republicans had a chance to kill both by killing the infrastructure bill.

As usual, we choked.

_Late on Friday night, the presidency of Joe Biden hung in the balance as House Speaker Nancy Pelosi brought the $1.2 trillion Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF) to the floor for a vote.

The issue was in doubt. While the Progressive Caucus agreed to vote for the measure, their assent was based on a deal Pelosi reached with more moderate Democrats in the House. The moderates would vote no later than November 15 on Biden’s other massive spending measure—a $1.75 trillion social spending bill.

But the deal failed to convince the radical “Squad” members to vote for the BIF. Reps. Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ayanna Pressley were perfectly willing to torpedo Biden’s agenda then and there and make him a one-term president.

But Pelosi, the Democratic Party, and Joe Biden were rescued by 13 Republican House members who wanted some pork to show the folks back home that it wasn’t all fun and games in Washington and that Congress actually did some work every once in a while.

What is so frustrating about this is that things aren’t going well anywhere for the Democrats. _

WE HAD THEM. WE COULD HAVE STOPPED THE INFLATION AND WE CHOKED.

Here are the names of the traitors. Remember them- we will be supporting their primary opponents!

Representative Brian Fitzpatrick

Representative Don Young

Representative Fred Upton

Representative Adam Kinzinger

Representative Jeff Van Drew

Representative John Katko

Representative Tom Reed

Representative Andrew Garbarino

Representative Nicole Malliotakis

Representative Chris Smith

Representative David McKinley

Representative Anthony Gonzalez

_**Now is the time to take these RINOs out.[Now is the time to help us launch devastating attacks that will help their primary opponents!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c485885be6&e=ba6e67b849)**_
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7fab32051a&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Now there's no barrier to the Dems passing the bigger, even more awful bill too.

Why primary the traitors?

Breitbart reports:

_The bipartisan infrastructure would also advance leftist priorities by:

Defines “gender identity” as a protected class.
Doles out “digital equity” grants partly based on racial or ethnic minority status.
State-mandated carbon reduction program
Contains funding for “zero-emission vehicles”
Addresses “over-the-road bus tolling equity”
Contains the word “equity” 64 times
Provides roughly $2.5 billion to help the U.S. government expand the border processing stations used by migrants from poor Central American nations and other regions around the world._

The conservative, America First movement needs MORE backup. LOTS of our nominees will win next year because Biden has screwed up so bad. But if all we elect is RINOs, then what good is it?

The Swamp has its secret dark money groups. We aren't that.

We provide backup to the good guys. We are RINO Hunters!

**We won't get politicians ready to remove Biden without winning these primaries.[Help us win them!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2fd45853f6&e=ba6e67b849)**

Don't let Biden pass anything. Ride it out until help arrives.

[Help us elect the right people to challenge Biden and defeat his bills.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c54878e538&e=ba6e67b849)

We want a huge contingent of America First fighters in Congress! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial to elect the right politicians!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=67debf6c33&e=ba6e67b849)

Impeach Biden, Harris and restore America First order. [Help me beat the Swampy RINOs!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=cff5ec4781&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,

name: Trump News HQ
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z873phsdnma9cnp6loo8k1030slj2a1j0se117d8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg6eoj4chh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9ijrliu3omavsfoovqin8i43onp6oblpfs7mq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg6eoj4chh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znnu7cttfdt2b7653kkbvr71ioffkpk10isbpv7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg6eoj4chh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfenq54s6iok55stgs4meeptk8o0g2t7jeveas5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg6eoj4chh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z122duhjcb02iba873slat0p33kd00973m0u7p0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chg6eoj4chh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zipa6e3gaacue12um530u1crltgjdn1k2fss5et8_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5jhtltls5i5i5cr59clv444gbgk295a7v8t0g2g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cti60pr2chi649fg)

body:

Friend,
---

---
**That’s why I’m SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day.**
---
_But I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts._

That’s why I’m SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day. But I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts. If we don’t secure Wisconsin’s elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor’s race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020. We cannot wait until the eve of next year’s election to address the WEC’s failure and willful neglect of the law. Which is exactly why I’m asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election. Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance: 1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes 2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities 3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election There’s too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Friend. Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result. Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair. Better yet, all across America we saw a RED WAVE sweeping through Democrat strongholds in Virginia, New Jersey, New York, and so on. body:
Hey Peter,
I know you heard we are already halfway through the quarter, and I have to be honest: we need your help.
We are going up against some really big-dollar spenders here, and we need to be able to compete. I believe that the U.S. Senate should be a place where the needs of the American people are the first and foremost concern. But we are behind, and we need your help to show our opponents that the people are with us!
Contribute $30 to get us back on track! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111-q4-kr-mm?refcode=211116-email&amount=30]
Thank you so much for your time and support,
Ken Russell

body:
White supremacy is not the greatest threat to our democracy. It's Marxist sympathizers. Do you agree? |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_t=y6Jn9WvRTUDsOKALgPv7w3bz8a8lbIBE8NYnF2ih6PXlS-C8hptWPKLCm0P51A_1hDXdLXDOV3gcI8QM0_aWe7goWIm-a0exviqYxQOIzWRNcnp6F9q7eGNEqnDC9O1CZ7vZHxQzMtCYpR-Fs3YVoVrb08MAj0GERL0uU1AwmBk%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLL36gof2ROcgs_49JtHVjH7anLaywf_AuCWdkORy9Cg4h5kPH_jmzHLp5e4WuuWnc8j3LAGdtBljKBIU_UoP0NeX0aKG1yWewOM7SFQS_MEFsUnZwjjKcvgvf7BsQd1cGqgBKMKlVSRUZJyIb-y-vicor45JCd0YB_aJIM5yWMUSOXjbOb1-d1J3bUyIINC0YqnhkkqBjjvV4ojEjpjEDiMA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

If you follow politics even just a little bit, then you’ll probably have heard of Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri. She’s a pretty spiteful person and has a habit of tweeting things about members of the Republican Party that are racist, false, and just plain deplorable.

Here is her latest tweet – presumably written in response to recent Republican victories in Virginia/New Jersey:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLL03lYlYyjDbBEHQB7vE9J3IcsJHLWRD1Go8m7A0kIXH5gwLqc1Rg4NuW6OPbW-mrnqoiywclKyYGsr_d29itGFUM7bcKCQS1KzyBurqkIdvu5v86eMREduP6d4mvLOL--9tLQZUXFStONDdeNX_tSHTp9NlUPfpqiuz_Kz9e2vjNwWZCFT5rV0gGWdUSSq4czfx1gOw3kPJUatrt6ZslxxQ%3D%3D)
As a black man - **who also happens to be a first generation American born to Haitian immigrants** - this kind of rhetoric makes me seethe. Ask anyone who knows me, and they’ll tell you that I’m a very even-keeled man. But this type of reverse racism cannot and should not be tolerated.

My name is Rod Dorilas, REPUBLICAN candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st congressional district, and I’m writing to you today to tell you that white supremacy is NOT the single greatest threat to our democracy. **The single greatest threat to OUR democracy is the radical socialist and Marxist ideologies/policies being peddled by the Far Left** , of which Ms. Bush is the leader.

**[Today, I’m humbly asking: would you consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign for the U.S. House so that I can challenge the lies Ms. Bush is pushing- straight to her face as a fellow member of Congress? ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLODzuwnocGtp1vTs0Uy_RABNLSR6J8GWtwiyrHDq0qTJmBQ1WV5zbfqhs4h3LRTfF5TIjXaGS2d5rjU1fF-QCDZMqdcmg6adGoAg2XtmTdpmX2BZpz_nE5QMcxMa8un64ZEK1p3JM-5XrzqsX9tOKmxq4tpt7U5_KYioat2ASpbwXyEvnv7yyyr9XTW4xAVi3oC3DtbyzpMX6-p1jKnrlqA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLOIzSG-Wp8BG79mHgXjDHJcbYBJUHpPrU7zqHbYO6lwKh3t5hCEyMx9kr7mRExuTY12PiZoeqVaJu8iKiWhHFNM84U_L9wkPDo0khjkF5yTxYbj91XRsYoik6B8zC8zzBgJ6HNbeAqYky7HJEeRxTQ3Ra-NBN9oOFMsYvs2WFR-_8EnGUCL6C640yp1e7Xkh0mg8vTi-yS2c998JRhudxZg%3D%3D)

[** HELP ME PUT A STOP TO DEMOCRAT RACISM >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLb7-nzD5C2le1LA6omZApRKYeRGMNDfa3Zdps7wcJFWhgi0AlHeGSM0vwLh2lmpUx9uILkeH09Do2Xl0HFrwffAnFkLVTOc1CEpUPD8LUewuBQwbbJprGg0guRFaTyMmtTJoJNf6ij9_yRkU_NSvTzstWMJF6VRRivISGM6TDfY1pUCImMDXg_j2v1w4qOPXryt032FnCBj6KM_nt4bZiOg%3D%3D)
Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap. Ms. Bush believes that African Americans are a monolithic group of people who cannot forge their own path.

Yes, slavery existed in this country for a very long time. And as it so happens, it was abolished a very long time ago. To say that the fallout from slavery is still holding people back is a lie promulgated by Democrats who want to keep black voters from switching to the Republican Party.

It’s GOT TO STOP.

**Every time Ms. Bush takes to twitter to spread her vitriol, she is insulting me and my family personally**.
1. I JOINED THE MILITARY AT 17 YEARS OLD TO SERVE THE STARS AND STRIPES.

2. I UTILIZED THE GI BILL TO PAY FOR MY LAW SCHOOL.

3. I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

4. My parents came to this country from Haiti, the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere, and picked crops in South Florida to make sure that my siblings and I could grow up to live OUR AMERICAN DREAM.

Please consider a gift to my campaign today so that I can let the folks in my district know that they have a choice between a member of the Democrat left and a Republican who believe the best days of the country are still ahead of us.

I don’t care about the color of people’s skin – **we are an EQUAL OPPORTUNITY COUNTRY** - the only thing that matters is whether or not you’re willing to put in the work to achieve your dreams.

[** HELP ME PUT A STOP TO DEMOCRAT RACISM >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLRtUMHx0G09kDRhiNRPnXNju0-ch37ie52mTEqWCNi46dMjKQwBojcstbU770LEkOcs1305MHwu2cLFKgZuQRr_e7-8BeFmIutZoUa9fBxLscXJ4tT-z5pGmG2dBb7HaHc_LziGs7XaP0BOpUIsYCmBjHJz2y9dr22lmnwygKdqxmxLETwdEgYMh-hiHwCm4YTkEBKcHOc6orG4PPk3ycaw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLblLhG8ZGJSYCKf9jJ6HvFg8GAFgVX1zRnnSMDPNEN1_x834LdlB8wTlR6E8BCfeTRm_dGtCyZXOW5ym8ANIsA7UOaLKe2NzfAbrChrK43cspca3nK3htFZ-BcFeiXGFhinV1jFdcMn3SJ_vCHT2QSB2-2vZ0mLT-IN9V0_Mdj4boXtPzWUeQ1c2LWySO97BThGzNAa92mHWWIF4ewr0VJQ%3D%3D)
I’m running for Congress to challenge the narrative that all African Americans think the way Ms. Bush does; it’s an insult to Americans like me who see America for all of her faults and embrace everything that has made our country the envy of the world for the past 200+ years.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas
Republican Candidate for Congress

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLargYXDKB2GQVb83-WmBFWdm8G3BC8ROe4Fd8Hp1IoXYXBp61uiWFdVeB01LCKObr6dD5g0yQoP9aZtlwNxtaC2ckeu1vLSCp74Xb2s9Y1l28-iCIsSPxIplFJCMFCnxWAh8uoi-04s-EHMoOdJKT85dEFJtlP1uqNxEa29YatFycX2pJ4fGnR9lFRv317TP7DSfADpEYZBAQZNpyG-c3yg%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_e=0KYGbKM8Mo288WO7pd3CSwBuYNR9IOa8lvQGb1MV43LmgF7rpKeYjVm7A6J3tTiIe-w5RrFch9tqb1M1Gv5Lt-w9GkfmePOV8zhxPKZ4e-UG5DrYNtcpmINf2Itcs4nmfm30ERS7JUI6WDHkUYRj0Rhkm7Aj_ERxfgNvJak05tOLPgThIjoIyBmMqRqn9PmZfSyn_Q8RTEPv9cfJUFhdTIs1vX46m7xyvuqXLPEjZ7Njn-tE8CauHgT_vsMqiRLLaNN9i0sl3YA7zSpDUQH5iUv2ROB6UVQixRvPsyPKfsK_Q4kGuPTl-feijDG2OkPNtCg2tCpef7QRAnSdkLHq88t0F9pXZpt-CMlvcPDY2z0yBwiaQiQSstCfEoDmJC6-X8ClDDRPkGXDMNHDUs6Sx-mSBSqzPBWouVzPPAkCI6XP2VDTwA5bXQBaqKb4WBs269vjOAaZsvfjyc7a9yW3jg%3D%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b583048b940c4367b51d48f3dd0e65d8&_t=y6Jn9WvRTUDsOKALgPv7w3bz8a8lbIBE8NYnF2ih6PXlS-C8hptWPKLCm0P51A_1hDXdLXDOV3gcI8QM0_aWe7goWIm-a0exviqYxQOIzWRNcnp6F9q7eGNEqnDC9O1CZ7vZHxQzMtCYpR-Fs3YVoVrb08MAj0GERL0uU1AwmBk%3D).

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

| Peter,

A new Washington Post/ABC News poll stopped me in my tracks this week. It shows Republicans beating Democrats in 2022 by ten points—the GOP’s biggest lead since 1981.

clean_body: Must Read. | Friend, Big things are happening in Iowa. The Red Wave is BACK, and stronger than ever. Even in deep blue states, we have seen conservative warriors fight to the top. Our chances at Taking Back the House and Senate are stronger than ever, and we NEED your help. Congresswoman Miller-Meeks is running for re-election in 2022! Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a good friend of mine and an even better leader. She is a veteran, a conservative warrior, and one of the strongest voices for Iowa we have ever had! Keeping her in the House is not a want - it is a NEED for American freedom and the preservation of conservative values . | She has a huge target on her back. Nancy Pelosi is coming for her - but with your help, we can stop her and Take Back the House! God Bless, Joni Ernst Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O.
