body:
The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=8b5fb48a16ea41dab95da1fab6c069f4&_e=poo_CeVSFrj5JCYboHms-ryjXMOjwn_T3o0-pQtVChw7PoTLFubs3MJzJFRnd0eRPSuyyNzijLyn9Oobc-fsqOiWy-u6kPVN7KyDNpmFAFkaiWlc6YVJtw9UxpFtDlWpLZXiTr6eB6u_d_3ZyjBKDtY82ecx1Pvlz9HlIz1IbFYcaEKcThV-F8gulNXcYRSVbnTEAMwExobhsnqiBhyl6LNGio23iHtPu2z465ESw4IoMiCl5X92fAjI3_w2KOXe_dqeofBO5em2Ik-AsLYHRGC5zvnZ07M0gEEGapRQIE7hY020l7719406yoWAV3hTHBxHFJUZ1cKSkhEh2KWnkpxOyhBS7yt4WbvWSVNjNxDY06QIYS41FZUVzXdk35CUoY0TRSEWHwQ4eRDGgmrpRBsMZWgCiiY3MD-yKQ5ubRBqZo3DYA5Fh-ETKeTOAeex) | Peter,

The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. He’s out at Republican fundraisers slamming his former boss, President Donald Trump - and obviously looking to position himself for the 2024 GOP nomination.

He’s also got a new book out, “Republican Rescue” - in which he apparently lays out his plan to save the Republican Party - from Donald Trump.

In Politico’s recent article _“Christie’s Calculus: Trump is ‘In the Rearview Mirror,’”_ we read that Christie thinks Trump is a “loser” for continuing to protest the stolen 2020 election.

Well, Peter, I was quoted in the Politico article, too - and I stand by what I said then: “To the Trump people he’ll come across as a traitor. And they’ll come after him, big-time...”

[**Peter, the establishment hacks in the media and squishy turncoats like Chris Christie think Donald J. Trump is securely in the “rearview mirror” for Republicans - but what about you?**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=8b5fb48a16ea41dab95da1fab6c069f4&_e=poo_CeVSFrj5JCYboHms-ryjXMOjwn_T3o0-pQtVChw7PoTLFubs3MJzJFRnd0eRPSuyyNzijLyn9Oobc-fsqOiWy-u6kPVN7KyDNpmFAFkaiWlc6YVJtw9UxpFtDlWpLZXiTr6eB6u_d_3ZyjBKDtY82ecx1Pvlz9HlIz1IbFYcaEKcThV-F8gulNXcYRSVbnTEAMwExobhsnqiBhyl6LNGio23iHtPu2z465ESw4IWN-sJfM2wSWDSU3l4Nd4XG9Xwv51l4-1sRrglUJtrUulCxIzCfHEpjiSNIEL9Hs6tybiMy7NKiGnVVOj47DmHWxDuu4W1igTpB2afdgsNENiWgy4_-6lmVijN5XViNQospdpgTgrg3EpwSoatkwJNUBT2Maen-Lw3vnItryQD-6Jl8Y6UD5FBN_8WyNPkY9n9LokuSfHJqZVeFJkXrk5g)

subject: Team, I’m feeling the pressure.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
Now is not the time to stand on the sidelines.

Team,

It’s game time.

The clock is ticking, and we are now less than a year out from the end zone -- unseating Mike Garcia. We’re closing in on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and your support is needed now more than ever. **Please help me and my team continue to fight for our community by chipping in $15 or whatever you can here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Quaye-MidMonth**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38700625/316666031/641313821?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.16_b2_qi_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIzYzM3Ny0zZTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZl77FlabVhwO05uBDgiWQbMQhMCebkCBMagUDjcR9c=)

name: Olivia
subject: URGENT: your name is missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58789067:JRKK-e2VN:m:1:3253819041:121E412A419F769C76B2972F7B9793D6:r)
Please choose one of the following options:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58789067:JRKK-e2VN:m:1:3253819041:121E412A419F769C76B2972F7B9793D6:r) | **[YES: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58789067:JRKK-e2VN:m:1:3253819041:121E412A419F769C76B2972F7B9793D6:r)** **[NO: I STAND WITH THE DEMOCRATS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58789067:JRKK-e2VN:m:1:3253819041:121E412A419F769C76B2972F7B9793D6:r)**
---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58789067:JRKK-e2VN:m:1:3253819041:121E412A419F769C76B2972F7B9793D6:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

clean_body: Hey Peter, My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app. Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed... We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages??? Please choose one of the following options: | ---|--- I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond. I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: President Trump Turns up Heat on Brnovich
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Catch the perps |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=70f0eb77a7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I have been leading the Vanguard in America’s audit and [now it is time to take the next step.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=358e310567&e=44b8c466b0)

**We found the fraud. Time to Act on it. It’s your turn to do YOUR job, Mark Brnovich.**

_And this is exactly the message which President Trump told America this week:_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=76ffd7038e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| In President Trump’s statement, he says:

_The great Patriots of Arizona are anxiously awaiting the Attorney General’s review of the large-scale Election Fraud that took place during the 2020 Presidential Election. The findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive. The results from the Congressional Election Integrity hearing that just took place in Washington, D.C., upon cross examination, were devastating to the other side. The Arizona Legislature (and other States!) should, at a minimum, decertify the Election. The American people deserve an answer, now!_

President Trump couldn’t be more right: We need an answer, now!

**The pressure which we have put on Brnovich thus far has caused him to take a crucial first step.**

_Just recently, he formally opened up an inquiry into the fraud that happened in the 2020 election._

**_But I stand by President Trump when I say this: If the perpetrators behind Arizona’s fraud do not end up in jail, then Mark Brnovich is as guilty as they are._**

_Help me and President Trump keep up the pressure on Arizona’s AG by a donation today! We need the warchest at this critical moment to go on the offense and make sure that Mark Brnovich doesn’t forget where he comes from!_
_“The Findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive.” – President Trump_
The audit showed fraud, and now it is Mark Brnovich’s job to prosecute. And the work will not be done until big names end up behind bars.

**This is the punishment for undermining America’s elections. Period.**

[And this is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=009569ba15&e=44b8c466b0) For America to heal and for election integrity to be restored, exactly two things need to happen.

**For the first, we need punishment of past crimes. Otherwise, the Leftist thieves are INCENTIVIZED to keep stealing. **

_Second, we need a clear path forward. And to have this clear path forward, we need Secretary of States, especially in key states such as Arizona, that support Election Integrity and will stand up to fraud._

[This is where you come in. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b09715d57d&e=44b8c466b0) We have ran a tremendous grassroots campaign bringing together patriots around the country. And the more attention on Election Integrity, the more the media, Big Tech, and the Leftist Establishment wants to stop us.

**_I need your help to bring Election Integrity to Arizona and to defend our elections. [Can you help me today so that I can help Republicans and President Trump in 2024?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f61003d58a&e=44b8c466b0)_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am proud to be the Election Integrity, Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. We are all in this together. If you have already joined the Election Integrity movement, thank you and [please continue to support us, we need all the help we can get.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9e772b4507&e=44b8c466b0)

**If you have been wondering about how to support the cause of Election Integrity, follow President Trump. He has supported our campaign and our fight for Election Integrity in Arizona. [Help us now so that I can fight for secure elections going forward – especially in 2024 – in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1bd70f7243&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f2838768ea&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e86c83b524&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a395a90284&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=646632c724) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=646632c724).

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: my last email to you before logging off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Peter: I know I've been in your inbox a lot recently, but this campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is incredibly important, so I have to get this one last email to you before logging off tonight.
Last month was an intense one. First, we learned that I outraised Sen. Grassley in our first fundraising quarter. Our team of more than 20,000 grassroots donors raised more than $1 MILLION – including contributions from all 99 Iowa counties.
But then, Donald Trump endorsed Sen. Grassley at a massive MAGA rally in Des Moines. Despite Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories and extremist rhetoric, Sen. Grassley made it clear he's with Trump 100% – opening the floodgates for the rest of the GOP establishment to do the same.
Voters I meet on the campaign trail don't want a senator who defends conspiracy theories and stands by Trump no matter what. They want someone who fights for their families, understands the problems they face and comes to the table with solutions. That's not Sen. Grassley – and unsurprisingly, polling shows nearly two-thirds of voters don't want to reelect him.
The momentum on the ground is real, but with Trump doing everything he can to divide our country, and the GOP raising tens of millions to take back the Senate, we cannot afford a single misstep. That's why I still need to raise another $3,470 tonight to reach my critical mid-month fundraising goal.
**So please, can you donate $5 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight so we can hit our mid-month goal, flip this seat blue and stop extremists like Trump and Sen. Grassley? Here's the best link: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38700980/316675173/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk329-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZmMGE2MC00MjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zeN8ivTocp-poFrTNB4ef361irhW33EueWuJDbYtyKo=)**
Thank you,

Abby

(Apologies for any typos, sent from my iPhone)
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Marco's iPhone
subject: I wouldn't normally email this late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
now is not the time to back down

---
I wouldn't normally email this late, friend, but I had to reach out one last time before tonight's midnight deadline. **With only hours until our mid-month fundraising deadline, we're still $1,284 short of our goal – the goal we set to take on GOP extremism next November and keep pushing this movement forward.**
Everything I've been saying is still 100% true: We CAN win this race – and experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to The Cook Political Report agree. But this isn't just a close race – POLITICO is calling it the most competitive open-seat race in the _country._ So we have to give everything we've got – or risk losing everything we've worked for.

**With so much on the line and so little time left until midnight, I have to ask right now:** **[Can you chip in $5, $10, whatever you can spare, to hit our mid-month goal by midnight, defeat these out-of-control GOP extremists, and finally flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38701208/316680858/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk301-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWJkNDk5NC00NjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmGNd6qMiEPirBX7Q-MEhc19QvAfGaLYJ_RQwCHiIjk=)**
Thank you,

Marco
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **M. Lopez**
Date: Mon, Nov 15, 2021
Subject: what's next depends on you
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38701209/316680859/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk301-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWJkNDk5NC00NjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmGNd6qMiEPirBX7Q-MEhc19QvAfGaLYJ_RQwCHiIjk=)
---
Friend, I have good news and bad news.
**The good news is that experts agree we have a real chance at flipping Arizona blue and electing a Democratic governor – the very thing The Washington Post says we NEED in order to defeat GOP extremism. **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling our battleground governor's race a TOSS-UP – and considering that POLITICO already called this the most competitive open-seat race in the country, this rating is a HUGE deal.
**But the bad news is that we're currently way below our mid-month goal**** – while our new extremist opponent is steadily rising in the polls****. If we don't raise another $6,481 before our mid-month deadline, Trump's handpicked candidate could surge ahead at the WORST moment. **We need to talk to each other and take responsibility not only for what solutions we’re implementing but also how we’re implementing those solutions. We need leaders who look to our communities for answers. We need each other.**

And I need your support to share my vision of better leadership, better politics, and better solutions that put families and businesses first.

[**Can you give $72, $220, $2022 or whatever you can afford to say enough to the political fighting and give Utah what we need? **](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ba32a7a269&e=10c1db3257)

As Utah’s next U.S. Senator, I will help us achieve a healthier, more inclusive, and more prosperous tomorrow and I need your help.

Thank you for your support!

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friends, We need leaders who won’t focus on political fighting, but will instead listen to Utahns and work with colleagues in Washington D.C. to deliver results for our state. As senator my priority will be making sure Utah voices are heard. We need to talk to each other and take responsibility not only for what solutions we’re implementing but also how we’re implementing those solutions. We need leaders who look to our communities for answers. We need each other. And I need your support to share my vision of better leadership, better politics, and better solutions that put families and businesses first. As Utah’s next U.S. Senator, I will help us achieve a healthier, more inclusive, and more prosperous tomorrow and I need your help. Thank you for your support! | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 1467 Bountiful, UT 84011 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Peter,
**I NEED YOUR HELP. **Our **first mid-quarter fundraising deadline** is this week and we need your support to make sure we hit our goal. **Mikie Sherrill** has already raised millions of dollars from her **_liberal_
_mega-donors_ _ in California_**. She wants to use that money to keep us from winning this election and taking back the U.S. House of Representatives.

## Please, **[CHIP IN](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=3fc081013e&e=ade10d3dbe) **what you can today. Let’s flip this seat back to Republican control.
#

>> [CHIP IN $100](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=b4cdf5d875&e=ade10d3dbe) <<**

There is still time to hit our first deadline, and I am counting on supporters like you, Peter, to give us the resources we need to reign in the Democrats and take back the U.S. House of Representatives.

I'm fighting for North Jersey. **Join our team and help us hit our first goal by donating today. **

Thank you for your support,

Larry Casha for Congress
* * *
_About Larry and his campaign:
Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. He has lived his entire life in New Jersey’s 11th District. He is a small business owner deeply involved in community and charitable organizations. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. It is time to save our nation from Pelosi’s socialist agenda, that is supported by Mikie Sherrill, which is attempting to change the fabric of the country. This shortchanges New Jersey, driving away the very friends and neighbors with whom we grew up._

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: What happened at the White House yesterday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, President Biden officially signed the Republican-backed
infrastructure bill into law and Democrats lost their biggest bargaining
chip to pass the investments for working people. Every day without action
on the accompanying Build Back Better plan is one more day without the
human infrastructure that Americans desperately need.

It’s no surprise that corporate Democrats Kyrsten Sinema and Henry Cuellar
were front and center at the White House signing ceremony. For months,
Sinema and Cuellar worked together to protect corporate interests and cut
out popular and progressive policy proposals.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84250?refcode=em20211116-20528&t=1002&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]Sinema and Cuellar smiling outside White House

Kyrsten Sinema and Henry Cuellar fought against expanding the social
safety net and investing in climate action. That is why we’re backing
Jessica Cisneros in her primary challenge against Cuellar and supporting a
full slate of progressives who won’t succumb to Sinema or Manchin’s
political games.

When we elect more Justice Democrats, we grow the power of progressives to
stand up against corporate Democrats like Cuellar, Sinema, and Manchin.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84250?refcode=em20211116-20528&t=1022&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]If you’re with us in our work to elect more JD’s to Congress, will you
chip in $3 right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84250?refcode=em20211116-20528&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]Contribute

The squad we supported in 2018 — AOC, Rashida, Ayanna, and Ilhan — and our
2020 candidates, Jamaal and Cori, all stood firm in their commitment to
protecting investments for working people. Now, as we face a more
challenging fight to secure Medicare expansion, universal pre-K, paid
leave, and climate action, it’s become evident that we must elect more
progressives like them.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84250?refcode=em20211116-20528&t=1024&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]Can you chip in $3 so we have the resources to go
all-in during the 2022 midterms? We need to ensure we have the resources
to beat Henry Cuellar AND expand our JD coalition in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84250?refcode=em20211116-20528&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211116-20528-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20528_1203867_G1nCWd&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20528%2E1203867%2EG1nCWd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: We can’t back down now. | | | Folks, Kevin McCarthy thinks he’s well on his way to becoming Speaker of the House. After wins in Virginia, the GOP has their sights set on taking back the House, but we all know that a McCarthy-run Congress would mean more divisiveness, less progress, and more Republican support for the insurrectionists who stormed our Capitol. We cannot let that happen. I’m fighting for the future of CA-23, from working to expand healthcare and economic justice to safeguarding our democracy -- I’ll be a leader Californians can trust. But I can’t do it alone. With your help, we can prove these far-right Republicans wrong and make CA-23 a place that future generations will be proud of. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. We can make it happen, Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Greg Abbott’s head start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Winning in Texas will be no easy feat.
#
Winning in Texas will be no easy feat.
Our opponent will have corporate PACs funneling in millions of dollars to attack us, plus the support of ultra-wealthy Washington Republicans. On top of all that, he’s had a big head start — _he even ran an ad attacking Beto before Beto jumped into this race._
We’re counting on grassroots donors like you to even the playing field. Folks like you chipping in $5 or $20 at a time are going to determine whether we can reach voters in all 254 Texas counties and earn their support.
[Help Beto build a winning campaign and go up against massive GOP spending in Texas by chipping in just $3 or more today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162895&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=162895%2E444211%2EZ9o-7h)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162895&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=162895%2E444211%2EZ9o-7h)**
Together, we can put an end to the fringe policies and incompetence that we’re seeing in Texas today. But victory will require a historic number of people coming together to fund this campaign, and we need as many as possible pitching in.
Whether we can pull together the kind of grassroots fundraising operation powerful enough to beat a Republican incumbent and the special interests backing his campaign is entirely up to us.
[Let’s show them what we’re made of. Pitch in just $3 or more to help power our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162895&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=162895%2E444211%2EZ9o-7h)
—Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211116-162895-footer&t=22&refcode2=162895_444211_Z9o-7h&akid=162895%2E444211%2EZ9o-7h)**

name: Mike Johnson
subject: A turkey-less Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
$100 for a turkey this year? | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f737c5c42e748a4a22cf0bb5d248676&_e=VOE20IsAUSXHY-IWi1XtVE2yD5MyyA6Dq3X43RobSGd35Zq9hi6QxzhRhSQogefnGWbl9DBhA0MXYYpiYovJ74KVJZOL6WXctmZv05CXXj6vzBG8xrWDz4IN1XaE3XbgtdJFWfpyqVlsuV7E6TwWvXG_hf1rMKrPQD4X57VyzAz5v4iNu7-0BX7ec40btxJGpL9xgbGGAhTO8j7w0ADxfWuFOfwZVFRj6vv95ziOYKai3XNPWYV78mANIFgtVQ7Qq86Stz1M9NQux6PtCw67xUa36muIxxfholyVuDWRuluxeOfcU2wuGkXo0qw0OleBCWW-FCebjSjp2L1BZh-3V-zWjrELTQS-kvobVI9z2TvbpaO92SR4Clb2_VVnj2uOZnugwMjQgfP8P3GO5_1HNA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

It’s being referred to as the #ThanksgivingTAX: how much more it will cost everyone this year to travel to Grandma’s house and enjoy a traditional Thanksgiving dinner with family.

It’s widely reported that _**Americans are facing the MOST expensive Thanksgiving in modern history**_. Turkey prices are up 27%, Costco pie is up 17%, potatoes are up 13%, and carrots are up 47%. _That is if you can even FIND those items this year._

[ END THE THANKSGIVING TAX:
_CHIP IN_ ➔](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f737c5c42e748a4a22cf0bb5d248676&_e=VOE20IsAUSXHY-IWi1XtVE2yD5MyyA6Dq3X43RobSGd35Zq9hi6QxzhRhSQogefnGWbl9DBhA0MXYYpiYovJ74KVJZOL6WXctmZv05CXXj6vzBG8xrWDz4IN1XaE3XbgtdJFWfpyqVlsuV7E6TwWvXG_hf1rMKrPQD4X57VyzAz5v4iNu7-0BX7ec40btxJGroHjxTAMyVaN2l8sTvMbYA3vPdrzd0bUhgAnSaZadQElRx_YaprpUPXNxw5ITSvR2qT3WxzIlVPzyW0DIQyaB6RuiRSq0zWX89XHcCk_Lm-aNL9glIEl7n0F_74LN23rHIvfZkqD_gFFsTT0iAR3te-7vE8ViaB66wHrE92e8nQ4FgCXJDq6eC57ycpC23Si6vDn06lGlKHGZsz_sN_GRg%3D%3D)
Due to President Biden’s supply chain crisis, you may not even be able to locate Thanksgiving food this year because there are major shortages of refrigerated pies, cranberry sauce, sweet potatoes and turkey.

Not to mention, the price of gas is up 60%, and airline ticket prices are skyrocketing. The Democrats' failed policies are causing real pain to real people.

[ END THE THANKSGIVING TAX:
_CHIP IN_ ➔](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f737c5c42e748a4a22cf0bb5d248676&_e=VOE20IsAUSXHY-IWi1XtVE2yD5MyyA6Dq3X43RobSGd35Zq9hi6QxzhRhSQogefnGWbl9DBhA0MXYYpiYovJ74KVJZOL6WXctmZv05CXXj6vzBG8xrWDz4IN1XaE3XbgtdJFWfpyqVlsuV7E6TwWvXG_hf1rMKrPQD4X57VyzAz5v4iNu7-0BX7ec40btxJG75v-XbSiKjhI3JO41EFCi7AWOVorR2-AnxBueKOetckLqroce7mbifxvOVg3Q0uIUUYCDm9BoURLun66As0fmx78vKv-qmOYXwzdT224L3Iuaack1ERDz_AiLX7QovrMaSt7RQb1gOdBh_52CgKRMUKvwQEhpujCITVVKGJmvG9hln6hQsEmPqvvQXFX4qfXc95tMXnYXgJHLYHPmPPdNA%3D%3D)
Fellow American - when does this stop? There’s no end in sight with Democrats “spend, spend, spend” agenda. While hard-working Americans are stuck with less money in our pockets, Democrats are inventing new and creative ways to tax us even further.

It’s widely reported that Americans are facing the MOST expensive Thanksgiving in modern history. Turkey prices are up 27%, Costco pie is up 17%, potatoes are up 13%, and carrots are up 47%. That is if you can even FIND those items this year. Due to President Biden’s supply chain crisis, you may not even be able to locate Thanksgiving food this year because there are major shortages of refrigerated pies, cranberry sauce, sweet potatoes and turkey. Not to mention, the price of gas is up 60%, and airline ticket prices are skyrocketing. The Democrats' failed policies are causing real pain to real people. Fellow American - when does this stop? body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ][IMG]

We have some EXCITING news, folks!

At the end of the month, Tim will call some donors who have chipped in
online to support our campaign for U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5912?t=1007&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Do you want a call from Tim, folks? Chip in right now to help
us reach our $75,000 November fundraising goal and he might call YOU to
say thanks!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5912?t=1008&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5913?t=1009&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5914?t=1010&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5915?t=1011&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Donate $200

Tim’s top priority is making sure this campaign represents
you, folks. So instead of calling wealthy donors and begging for
money like other politicians, he wants to spend some of his time speaking
directly with the people this campaign works for.

$5, $10, $25, $50 -- the amount doesn’t matter. What’s most important to
Tim is knowing you have his back. Because building strong, small-dollar
grassroots support is the ONLY way we’ll compete with (and beat!)
whichever wealthy, PAC-funded candidate the GOP decides to throw their
support behind.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5912?t=1012&akid=1458%2E3611125%2EFAV6gb ]Tim will pick some grassroots supporters to call this week. So chip in
any amount right now to help us reach our $75,000 November fundraising
goal -- and then keep your phone close by because your next call could be
from Tim!

Thanks for your continued support,

Team Ryan

Donald J. Trump November 16th, 2021
Endorsement of Mick Bricker
West Michigan has produced some very lackluster Republican Leaders. There are great people there who want to win, but the leaders they’ve had are horrible. Mick Bricker is a winner—he’s been successful in business and has raised a beautiful family. Mick is the kind of high integrity America First Republican that everyone thinks they’re voting for, but instead they end up with Mitch McConnell types. Mick is the real deal, he’s a champion on Election Integrity, he knows there was systemic voter fraud in the 2020 Election, and he can’t wait to expose the fraud so that the criminals involved can be exposed and we can fix our Elections so that this never happens again. He won’t let anyone influence him and he knows what’s right. I completely Endorse Mick Bricker for Michigan State Representative!

subject: These victims deserve justice
body:
New York deserves new leadership. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=e56ebdfb43&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
|
Friend,

New York’s criminal justice system has been re-calibrated by Albany to favor criminals over law-abiding citizens. Victims of crimes in New York are not supported, but rather ostracized, while the criminal gets away scot-free.

When cash bail was eliminated for violent offenders, we saw a spike in crime across the state and continue to see thugs and criminals get away with heinous crimes.

In the past weeks, a man accused of double murder has been set free, in NYC an 11-year old girl was strangled and the criminal is out and about, and an 89-year old pickpocket victim gets no justice as the career crook walks away.

These victims deserve justice, they deserve change, they deserve leadership that cares for them!

[**If you agree it's time to repeal NO CASH BAIL LAW please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to support Rob Astorino for Governor.**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=1a6dfa68ac&e=3ca66fc65a)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=dd0070d4e0&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=df0cbc0fbd&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=543f961902&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=31683c1198&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[REPEAL NO CASH BAIL LAW ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=06fcf8b7b2&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|
Rob would work to repeal the dangerous “No Cash Bail” law and would seek to reform the state’s parole system and parole board and make it harder to release rapists and murderers back into our communities. As Westchester County Executive, Rob created a “Safer Communities” initiative that focused on community-based solutions to address such issues as youth mental health, the opioid crisis and domestic violence.

New York deserves new leadership.

Thank you,
Team Astorino
---
|
[REPEAL NO CASH BAIL LAW ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=6ceb3a7499&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=ac9d2665a5&e=3ca66fc65a)._

I’m counting on YOU to do your part to power us to victory in this race that we MUST WIN to take back the House majority. Democrat establishment. And earlier this month, Republican Glenn Youngkin followed the same playbook to win a stunning upset in Virginia. When conservatives are engaged, we’re unstoppable. But the key to defeating the radical Left is staying vigilant. We have to hit every single one of our fundraising benchmarks so we have the resources we need to defend this MUST-WIN seat from Nancy Pelosi. Our path to victory in this critical race relies on your continued support, Peter. Unlike Pelosi and her DCCC, I don’t have a $106.5 million war chest at my disposal. I don’t have special interest groups pouring millions into my campaign. I’m powered by Americans like YOU who believe in me and the conservative values I stand for. Nancy Pelosi thinks we can’t sustain our enthusiasm after our huge win. Let’s prove her wrong by CRUSHING the first deadline since we FLIPPED Virginia. Only Tiffany has the backbone and true conservative chops to stand up and fight against the disastrous policies that Biden and his Democrats are pushing ** We don’t need a weak Republican. We need a conservative outsider as AG who knows what it means to sign a paycheck. Equally important, we need a conservative fighter who doesn’t just talk about their conservative values, but lives them. name: Morgan Harper
subject: The fight HAS to continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The Ohio Senate just passed an extremely gerrymandered map.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211116-397-footer-ak&t=2&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)
The Ohio Senate just passed an extremely gerrymandered congressional map, giving Republicans 80% of the seats in our state despite them only winning 53% of the vote.
**I’ll be clear: the Ohio GOP is working to make the state legislature no longer legitimate, and this is a sad day for Ohio.**
This fight _has_ to continue. We need to abolish the filibuster and pass legislation to end partisan gerrymandering and ensure free, fair, and secure elections for everyone.
**[I’m the only candidate who can flip this seat blue and become the 51st YES vote on ending the filibuster and ending gerrymandering once and for all. Can you rush a donation of $5 so we can get to the Senate and fight back?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14416?t=3&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14422?refcode=em20211116-397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)**
It’s no wonder Ohioans are so tired of political corruption, and done with career politicians who will do whatever it takes to rig the system, enrich themselves, and protect their wealthy and powerful friends at the expense of working people.
That’s why we’re running this outsider campaign to actually change things. I’m proud to have stood beside the organizers and citizens who are fighting for fair electoral maps.
This work continues.
Morgan Harper
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14416?t=23&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211116-397-footer&t=24&refcode2=397_90090_njoCAy&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=397%2E90090%2EnjoCAy)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

body:

| | Peter,

Louisiana needs a consensus builder in Washington D.C., not the hate, division, and partisan theatrics of Sen. John Kennedy.

On Monday, President Biden signed the bipartisan infrastructure deal that will invest billions of dollars into Louisiana's crumbling infrastructure. However, Kennedy once again cited the bill as "stupid" and "wasteful."

body:
Enjoy a quick recap of the event on Saturday!! We're doing it! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/94f3919e0aaf/we-should-all-be-proud-of-this-thank-you?e=77bc5297c6)

# IN CASE YOU MISSED IT....
Dear Patriots!

Not only did we party like it was 1776 on Saturday BUT we also raised over $5,400.00 for marketing, for the Campaign - **THANK YOU! **

**IN CASE YOU MISSED IT**....***Listen to Melissa Martz give a heart felt and hard hitting message***

**[CLICK HERE](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=b84a968767&e=77bc5297c6)**

*If you like what you hear, SHARE the message!*

This event was more than a fundraiser. It was the manifestation of WE the people, actively uniting to preserve our Republic. BIG "Thank Yous" go out to all who volunteered and donated! The evening was sponsored by both Nate and Clai. The Campaign is so grateful for their vision and execution.

Stay tuned for what is next in the fight to take back our Republic!

STAY FREE,

Melissa Martz Campaign

clean_body: Enjoy a quick recap of the event on Saturday!! We're doing it! | | | | | | | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT.... Dear Patriots! Not only did we party like it was 1776 on Saturday BUT we also raised over $5,400.00 for marketing, for the Campaign - THANK YOU! IN CASE YOU MISSED IT....*Listen to Melissa Martz give a heart felt and hard hitting message If you like what you hear, SHARE the message! This event was more than a fundraiser. It was the manifestation of WE the people, actively uniting to preserve our Republic. BIG "Thank Yous" go out to all who volunteered and donated! The evening was sponsored by both Nate and Clai. The Campaign is so grateful for their vision and execution. Stay tuned for what is next in the fight to take back our Republic! STAY FREE, Melissa Martz Campaign | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Melissa Martz Campaign CD 18, All rights reserved.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: NEW AD: Keep the change
body:
Our Senior Citizens need a break.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/TupmhQVlUc6uDxz2Gvx6yw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)
Patriot,

Our Senior Citizens need a break.

They’ve worked hard their entire lives and paid into the Social Security System.

And MANY seniors are still working through their retirement years to make ends meet.

Americans who are 75 and older have the fastest “returning to work” rate among Senior Citizens.

If you do the math, a married couple earning a “living wage” of $40,873 in Florida (including their Social Security benefits) will have taxes applied to 68% of their Social Security checks!

**That’s obscene, and it needs to end.**

And it’s why as a member of Congress, **I support tax-free Social Security for our Seniors!**

Watch my newest campaign ad here:

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/TupmhQVlUc6uDxz2Gvx6yw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)
This is a no-brainer.

As Democrats scream about “living wages” and seriously consider handing monthly paychecks to millennial non-workers **and illegal aliens** as a new entitlement, our Seniors’ needs are ignored.

We hand them back minimal returns from a life-long investment that doesn’t even come close to matching stock market rates – and then we tax that income?

It’s wrong!

In fact, did you know that in 1983, it was then Senator Joe Biden who was the deciding vote on the 50% tax on Social Security checks!

I’m going in on day one with a plan that will ease the burden on our seniors and give them a few thousand more dollars in their pockets to pay bills, fund visits to see their grandchildren, or give them a much-deserved, more comfortable life.

**[All I need is your help to get to Washington.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/TupmhQVlUc6uDxz2Gvx6yw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)

[DONATE $10 TO AIR THIS AD TO 400 SENIORS.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/qlUunVgRBoSxgqRJL28cvQ/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)

[DONATE $25 TO AIR THIS AD TO 1,000 SENIORS.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/TupmhQVlUc6uDxz2Gvx6yw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)

[DONATE $50 TO AIR THIS AD TO 2,000 SENIORS.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QUgF1rNPMjdaFlNKRToWRw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)

[DONATE $100 TO AIR THIS AD TO 4,000 SENIORS!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/MNUMp7wu7CzPRy4eBjQnvw/wgaYJXmUmfrTtS9h20J7UA)**
Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: We hope you’ve taken the first step towards sending Governor Lujan Grisham packing. Mark has been sending you emails to make sure you know he’s read Peter, We hope you’ve taken the first step towards sending Governor Lujan Grisham packing. Mark has been sending you emails to make sure you know he’s ready to fight for the future of our state. We all recognize the terrible direction the current administration is taking our state.... And we’re all coming together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. While New Mexicans struggled during the COVID-19 pandemic, the Governor gave massive taxpayer-funded pay raises to her political appointees. She told us not to have family gatherings, but then got busted spending thousands on things like Wagyu beef and high-end liquor at the Governor’s mansion for gatherings of her own. Parents across our state saw what happens when the government has control of our children’s education... Even though we’re dead last in the nation, MLG shut down our schools, shut down learning, and only set our children back further. Mark is tired of this hypocrisy from the Left, and he’s committed to being a governor that will act on behalf of New Mexicans to protect our values and right the ship. Our state deserves so much better. Your support today is critical to help us fight back against the attacks from the Governor and her deep-pocketed special interest groups. Team Ronchetti \------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, I am running for governor of New Mexico because we need someone to lead the state who is on the side of honest, hard-working New Mexicans. I want New Mexico to be the best state to get an education, raise a family, and find a job. But, the opposite is happening right now under the current administration. Governor Lujan Grisham has taken the state we love in the wrong direction: ❌ Crime is completely out of control ❌ 40% of small businesses closed for good thanks to her shutdowns ❌ Our education system is ranked dead last. ❌ Instead of sending COVID relief funds to struggling families, New Mexico gave stimulus checks to illegal immigrants! It’s time for new leadership. This election won’t be easy. The other side will attack us... They’ll lie about us. And they’ll do anything to hold onto power. They even started attacking me PRIOR to launching my campaign! But with you on our side, they’re going to lose. I’m counting on you, Peter and your support means the world to me! Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

body:

| | Dear Friend, This is shocking: President Biden is sneaking in illegal immigrants during the middle of the night! That’s right, Biden has been caught using YOUR taxpayer money to fly illegal immigrants into Florida airports in the middle of the night. ****

---
| These migrants go through little to no screening when entering the country. **Unfortunately, Florida has already dealt with the violent consequences of the left’s open border agenda. ** **Thanks to Biden’s border negligence, an innocent Jacksonville man was murdered by Yery Noel Medina Ulloa: a 24-year-old illegal migrant that flew in on one of the midnight planes.**

| [STOP ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION - DONATE HERE](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5303fb513b&e=c2296cffff "STOP ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION - DONATE HERE")
---
| President Trump understood the dangers of a wide open southern border. The violence and crime from the south are now spilling into states like Florida thanks to Biden’s incompetence. Amanda Makki FULLY supported President Trump’s Pro-America stance on immigration and border security from Day One. Unlike her opponents, Amanda can be counted on to follow through on our conservative values when she’s in Congress. **But she needs your support to bring back America First policies to Washington, and end ridiculous liberal policies like Biden’s midnight migrant flights to Florida.** [_**Can Amanda count on your support in her fight to hold Biden accountable for his open border policies?**_](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=71a683e09e&e=c2296cffff)
